    # Tier: Total

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    5x
                    
                      
    res_total <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    5x
                    
                      
      .calc_abnormal_logic("Total", abn_val, postbaseline_name, id, by)

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    5x
                    
                      
    cards::bind_ard(res_not_abn, res_is_abn, res_total) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    5x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(variable = abn_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  }) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    4x
                    
                      
    cards::bind_ard() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    4x
                    
                      
      context = "abnormal_by_baseline",

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    4x
                    
                      
      stat_label = dplyr::coalesce(.data$stat_label, .data$stat_name)

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    # Final cleanup of types

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    4x
                    
                      
      dplyr::any_of(c("variable", "variable_level", "context", "stat_name", "stat_label", "level")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    4x
                    
                      
      as.character

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
    )) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    4x
                    
                      
    cards::as_card(check = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    4x
                    
                      
  class(stats_for_tbl$variable_level) <- "list"

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    4x
                    
                      
  stats_for_tbl

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#' Internal Calculation Helper for Abnormality Tabulation

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#' Acts as the calculation engine for baseline-stratified abnormality summaries.

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#' It computes the numerator (`n`, unique patients with the abnormality),

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#' denominator (`N`, total unique patients in the subset), and proportion (`p`)

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
#' using `cards::ard_mvsummary`. It then forcefully applies the specified

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
#' baseline tier label to the resulting ARD object.

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
#' @param df (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
#'   A pre-filtered data frame containing the clinical results for a specific baseline status tier.

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
#' @param group_label (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
#'   The label to assign to the calculated statistics (e.g., `"Not Low"`, `"Total"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
#'   This will overwrite the `variable_level` and `level` columns in the output ARD.

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
#' @param abn_val (`character` vector)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
#'   A vector of values defining the target abnormality in the post-baseline column

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
#'   (e.g., `c("LOW", "LOW LOW")`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
#' @param postbaseline (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
#'   The column name containing the post-baseline reference range indicators.

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
#' @param id (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
#'   The column name for the unique subject identifier.

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
#' @param by (`character` vector or `NULL`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
#'   Optional column names for grouping variables (e.g., `"TRT01A"`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
#' @return An ARD data frame containing the customized `abnormal` statistic (`n`, `N`, `p`),

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
#'   or `NULL` if the input `df` has zero rows.

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
#' @keywords internal

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
#' @noRd

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
.calc_abnormal_logic <- function(df, group_label, abn_val, postbaseline, id, by) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    15x
                    
                      
  if (nrow(df) == 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    14x
                    
                      
  cards::ard_mvsummary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    14x
                    
                      
    data = df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    14x
                    
                      
    variables = all_of(postbaseline),

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    14x
                    
                      
    by = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    14x
                    
                      
    statistic = ~ list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    14x
                    
                      
      abnormal = \(x, data, ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    32x
                    
                      
        n_abn <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    32x
                    
                      
          dplyr::filter(.data[[postbaseline]] %in% abn_val) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    32x
                    
                      
          dplyr::pull(all_of(id)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    32x
                    
                      
          dplyr::n_distinct()

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    32x
                    
                      
        N_total <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    32x
                    
                      
          dplyr::pull(all_of(id)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    32x
                    
                      
          dplyr::n_distinct()

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    32x
                    
                      
        dplyr::tibble(n = n_abn, N = N_total, p = n / N)

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
  ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
    # FORCE level and variable_level to character strings.

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    14x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    14x
                    
                      
      variable_level = as.character(group_label),

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    14x
                    
                      
      level = as.character(group_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Plot Pharmacokinetic Concentration Time Profile

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Creates a standard Pharmacokinetic (PK) concentration-time profile plot.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' This function wraps `ggplot2` calls to consistently format PK profiles,

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' handling log transformations, various summary statistics, and variability measures.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'    The dataset containing PK data.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time_var ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'    The time variable (x-axis).

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param analyte_var ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'    The concentration/analyte variable (y-axis).

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @param group ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'    The grouping/treatment variable.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @param stat (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'    Primary summary statistic: `"mean"` or `"median"`. Default is `"mean"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @param variability (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'    Variability measure: `"sd"`, `"se"`, `"ci"`, `"iqr"`, or `"none"`. Default is `"sd"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param log_y (`logical`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'    Whether to apply log10 scale to the y-axis. Default is `TRUE`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @param lloq (`numeric` or `NULL`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'    Lower Limit of Quantification. Default is `NA_real_`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns A `ggplot` object.

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' # Prepare PK Data using the built-in Theoph dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk <- Theoph

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk$Time_Nominal <- round(df_pk$Time)

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' # Filter to specific timepoints to keep the table clean

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk <- df_pk[df_pk$Time_Nominal %in% c(0, 2, 4, 8, 24), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' # Create a mock treatment group based on Dose

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk$Dose_Group <- ifelse(df_pk$Dose > 4.5, "High Dose", "Low Dose")

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' # Linear Scale Example (Baseline 0 is included)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' gg_pkc_lineplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_pk,

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_var = Time_Nominal,

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   analyte_var = conc,

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   group = Dose_Group,

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'   stat = "mean",

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   variability = "sd",

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   log_y = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' # Log Scale Example (Filter out 0s first to avoid log(0) warnings)

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::filter(conc > 0) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'   gg_pkc_lineplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'     time_var = Time_Nominal,

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'     analyte_var = conc,

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'     group = Dose_Group,

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'     stat = "mean",

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'     variability = "se",

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'     log_y = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'     lloq = 2.0

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' # Title, subtitle, axes labels and legend position customization

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' gg_pkc_lineplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_pk,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_var = Time_Nominal,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#'   analyte_var = conc,

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'   group = Dose_Group,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'   stat = "mean",

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'   variability = "sd",

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'   log_y = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'   ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'     x = "Nominal time (hr)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#'     y = "Concentration (ng/mL)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#'     title = "Title",

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#'     subtitle = "Subtitle"

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#'   ggplot2::theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#'     legend.position = "top"

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
gg_pkc_lineplot <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
                            time_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
                            analyte_var,

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
                            group,

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
                            stat = c("mean", "median"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
                            variability = c("sd", "se", "ci", "iqr", "none"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
                            log_y = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
                            lloq = NA_real_) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    14x
                    
                      
  stat <- match.arg(stat)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    13x
                    
                      
  variability <- match.arg(variability)

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
  # Mandatory Arguments Validation

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    13x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    13x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(time_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(analyte_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(group)

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
  # Tidy-selection processing

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    12x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    12x
                    
                      
    data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    12x
                    
                      
    time_var = {{ time_var }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    12x
                    
                      
    analyte_var = {{ analyte_var }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    12x
                    
                      
    group = {{ group }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
  # Ensure only single columns were selected

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_string(time_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_string(analyte_var)

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_string(group)

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
  # BUILD PLOT

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    12x
                    
                      
  pd <- ggplot2::position_dodge(width = 0.2)

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    12x
                    
                      
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    12x
                    
                      
    data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    12x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::aes(

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    12x
                    
                      
      x = .data[[time_var]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    12x
                    
                      
      y = .data[[analyte_var]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    12x
                    
                      
      color = .data[[group]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    12x
                    
                      
      shape = .data[[group]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    12x
                    
                      
      linetype = .data[[group]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
  ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    12x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::stat_summary(fun = stat, geom = "line", linewidth = 0.8, position = pd) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    12x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::stat_summary(fun = stat, geom = "point", size = 2, position = pd)

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
  # Add Variability (Error Bars)

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    12x
                    
                      
  if (stat == "mean" && variability %in% c("sd", "se", "ci")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    8x
                    
                      
    p <- p + ggplot2::stat_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    8x
                    
                      
      fun.data = function(val) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    52x
                    
                      
        m <- mean(val, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    52x
                    
                      
        se <- stats::sd(val, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(val)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    52x
                    
                      
        err <- switch(variability,

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    52x
                    
                      
          "sd" = stats::sd(val, na.rm = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    52x
                    
                      
          "se" = se,

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    52x
                    
                      
          "ci" = stats::qt(0.975, df = max(1, sum(!is.na(val)) - 1)) * se

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    52x
                    
                      
        data.frame(y = m, ymin = m - err, ymax = m + err)

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
      },

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    8x
                    
                      
      geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, position = pd

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    4x
                    
                      
  } else if (stat == "median" && variability == "iqr") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    1x
                    
                      
    p <- p + ggplot2::stat_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    1x
                    
                      
      fun.data = function(val) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    6x
                    
                      
        m <- stats::median(val, na.rm = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    6x
                    
                      
        ymin_val <- unname(stats::quantile(val, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE))

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    6x
                    
                      
        ymax_val <- unname(stats::quantile(val, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE))

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    6x
                    
                      
        data.frame(y = m, ymin = ymin_val, ymax = ymax_val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
      },

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    1x
                    
                      
      geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, position = pd

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    3x
                    
                      
  } else if (variability != "none") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    2x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort("Invalid combination of stat ({.val {stat}}) and variability ({.val {variability}}).")

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
  # Log Scale & LLOQ

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    10x
                    
                      
  if (log_y) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    3x
                    
                      
    p <- p + ggplot2::scale_y_log10()

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    10x
                    
                      
  if (!is.na(lloq)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    1x
                    
                      
    p <- p + ggplot2::geom_hline(

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    1x
                    
                      
      yintercept = lloq,

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    1x
                    
                      
      linetype = "dashed",

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    1x
                    
                      
      color = "gray50"

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
  # THEMING & SCALES

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    10x
                    
                      
  p <- p +

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    10x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme_classic() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    10x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    10x
                    
                      
      legend.position = "bottom",

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    10x
                    
                      
      legend.title.position = "top",

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    10x
                    
                      
      legend.title.align = 0.5,

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    10x
                    
                      
      legend.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    10x
                    
                      
      plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    10x
                    
                      
  new_x_scale <- ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    10x
                    
                      
    breaks = unique(data[[time_var]]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    10x
                    
                      
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = 0.05)

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    10x
                    
                      
  p <- p +

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    10x
                    
                      
    new_x_scale + ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = range(data[[time_var]]))

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    10x
                    
                      
  class(p) <- c("crane_gg_pkc", class(p))

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    10x
                    
                      
  p

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Create MMRM Line Plot

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Generates a standardized line plot for Mixed-Effect Repeated Measures Model (MMRM)

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' analysis. It displays adjusted means (change from baseline)

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' along with either 95% Confidence Intervals (CI) or Standard Errors (SE) over time.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param mmrm_df (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'   A tidy data frame containing the MMRM results. Usually the output of [get_mmrm_results()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param arm (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   The column in `mmrm_df` that identifies the treatment arms.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param visit (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   The column in `mmrm_df` that identifies the visits.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param error_bar (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   Type of error bars to display. Either `"ci"` (95% Confidence Interval) or `"se"` (Standard Error).

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default is `"ci"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @param dodge_width (`numeric`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'   The amount to jitter the x-axis points to prevent overlapping error bars. Default is `0.15`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @param hline (`numeric` or `NULL`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   The y-intercept for a horizontal reference line. Set to `NULL` to remove. Default is `0`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param legend_pos (`numeric` vector or `string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   The position of the legend. To place it inside the plot on the bottom left, use `c(0.02, 0.02)`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   Can also be standard string positions like `"bottom"`, `"right"`, `"none"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A `ggplot` object.

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @seealso [get_mmrm_results()] to get the MMRM results, and [tbl_mmrm()] for a summary table of the MMRM results.

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf identical(Sys.getenv("NOT_CRAN"), "true") && requireNamespace("mmrm", quietly = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' library(mmrm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' fv_dt <- mmrm::fev_data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'     ARMCD = factor(ARMCD)

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' # Fit an MMRM model using the FEV data

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' fit_mmrm <- mmrm::mmrm(

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   formula = FEV1 ~ RACE + SEX + ARMCD * AVISIT + us(AVISIT | USUBJID),

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = fv_dt

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' mmrm_results <- get_mmrm_results(fit_mmrm, arm = "ARMCD", visit = "AVISIT", conf_level = 0.95)

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' # Create a plot with SE bars, jittered by 0.2, legend inside bottom-left

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' my_plot <- gg_mmrm_lineplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   mmrm_df = mmrm_results,

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm = "ARMCD",

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   visit = "AVISIT",

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'   error_bar = "se", # Switch to "ci" for Confidence Intervals

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'   dodge_width = 0.2, # Jitters the x-axis to prevent overlap

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'   legend_pos = c(0.02, 0.02)

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' print(my_plot)

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom rlang .data

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
gg_mmrm_lineplot <- function(mmrm_df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
                             arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
                             visit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
                             error_bar = c("ci", "se"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
                             dodge_width = 0.15,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
                             hline = 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
                             legend_pos = c(0.02, 0.02)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    8x
                    
                      
  error_bar <- match.arg(error_bar)

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
  # 1. Mandatory Arguments & Tidy-selection

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(mmrm_df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(arm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(visit)

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    8x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    8x
                    
                      
    mmrm_df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    8x
                    
                      
    arm = {{ arm }}, visit = {{ visit }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  # 2. Type & Class Checking

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(mmrm_df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_class(mmrm_df, "mmrm_df")

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_string(arm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_string(visit)

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
  # 3. Graphical Parameter Validation

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    8x
                    
                      
  if (!is.numeric(dodge_width) || length(dodge_width) != 1) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    2x
                    
                      
    stop("`dodge_width` must be a single numeric value.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(hline) && (!is.numeric(hline) || length(hline) != 1)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    1x
                    
                      
    stop("`hline` must be a single numeric value or NULL.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (!is.character(legend_pos) && !is.numeric(legend_pos)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    1x
                    
                      
    stop("`legend_pos` must be a character string (e.g., 'bottom') or a numeric vector of length 2.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
  # 1. Standardize column names for easy plotting

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    4x
                    
                      
  plot_df <- mmrm_df |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    4x
                    
                      
      Arm = dplyr::any_of(arm),

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    4x
                    
                      
      Visit = dplyr::any_of(visit),

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    4x
                    
                      
      est = "estimate_est",

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    4x
                    
                      
      se = "se_est",

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    4x
                    
                      
      lcl = "lower_cl_est",

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    4x
                    
                      
      ucl = "upper_cl_est"

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
  # Capture the original chronological order of the visits

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    4x
                    
                      
  orig_visit_levels <- if (is.factor(mmrm_df[[visit]])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    4x
                    
                      
    levels(mmrm_df[[visit]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    !
                    
                      
    unique(as.character(mmrm_df[[visit]]))

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
  # 2. Inject the Baseline zero-point for Change from Baseline

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    4x
                    
                      
  base_rows <- plot_df |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::distinct(.data$Arm) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    4x
                    
                      
      Visit = "Baseline",

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    4x
                    
                      
      est = 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    4x
                    
                      
      se = 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    4x
                    
                      
      lcl = 0,

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    4x
                    
                      
      ucl = 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
  # Combine and explicitly enforce the exact original order

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    4x
                    
                      
  plot_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(base_rows, plot_df) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    4x
                    
                      
      Visit = factor(.data$Visit, levels = c("Baseline", orig_visit_levels))

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
  # 3. Calculate plotting bounds based on SE or CI preference

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
  # Safely check if the overall post-baseline trend is negative

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    4x
                    
                      
  is_negative_trend <- mean(plot_df$est[plot_df$Visit != "Baseline"], na.rm = TRUE) < 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    4x
                    
                      
  if (error_bar == "se") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    1x
                    
                      
    plot_df <- plot_df |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    1x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    1x
                    
                      
        plot_y = if (!is_negative_trend) -.data$est else .data$est,

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    1x
                    
                      
        ymin   = if (!is_negative_trend) -.data$est - .data$se else .data$est - .data$se,

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    1x
                    
                      
        ymax   = if (!is_negative_trend) -.data$est + .data$se else .data$est + .data$se

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    1x
                    
                      
    y_label <- "Mean (\u00B1 SE) Change from Baseline"

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    3x
                    
                      
  } else if (error_bar == "ci") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    3x
                    
                      
    plot_df <- plot_df |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    3x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    3x
                    
                      
        plot_y = if (!is_negative_trend) -.data$est else .data$est,

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    3x
                    
                      
        ymin   = if (!is_negative_trend) -.data$ucl else .data$lcl,

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    3x
                    
                      
        ymax   = if (!is_negative_trend) -.data$lcl else .data$ucl

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    3x
