    y_label <- "Mean (\u00B1 95% CI) Change from Baseline"

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
  # 4. Build the plot with jittering (position_dodge)

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    4x
                    
                      
  pd <- ggplot2::position_dodge(width = dodge_width)

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    4x
                    
                      
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    4x
                    
                      
    plot_df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::aes(

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    4x
                    
                      
      x = .data$Visit,

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    4x
                    
                      
      y = .data$plot_y,

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    4x
                    
                      
      group = .data$Arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    4x
                    
                      
      color = .data$Arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    4x
                    
                      
      shape = .data$Arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    4x
                    
                      
      linetype = .data$Arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
  # Optional Reference Line

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    4x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(hline)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    3x
                    
                      
    p <- p + ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = hline, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50", alpha = 0.7)

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
  # Add Lines, Points, and Error Bars

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    4x
                    
                      
  p <- p +

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_line(position = pd, linewidth = 0.5) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_errorbar(ggplot2::aes(ymin = .data$ymin, ymax = .data$ymax),

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    4x
                    
                      
      width = 0.15, position = pd, linewidth = 0.6

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
    ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_point(position = pd, size = 1.5, fill = "white", stroke = 1) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
    # Formatting and Theming

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::labs(

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    4x
                    
                      
      x = "Visit",

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    4x
                    
                      
      y = y_label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    4x
                    
                      
      color = "Treatment",

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    4x
                    
                      
      shape = "Treatment",

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    4x
                    
                      
      linetype = "Treatment"

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
    ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme_classic() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    4x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    4x
                    
                      
      legend.position = legend_pos,

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    4x
                    
                      
      legend.justification = if (is.numeric(legend_pos)) c(0, 0) else "center",

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    4x
                    
                      
      legend.background = ggplot2::element_rect(

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    4x
                    
                      
        fill = ggplot2::alpha("white", 0.9), color = "grey50",

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    4x
                    
                      
        linewidth = 0.5

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    4x
                    
                      
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    4x
                    
                      
      panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_line(color = "gray90"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    4x
                    
                      
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5)

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    4x
                    
                      
  p

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Hierarchical Rates and Counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' A mix of adverse event rates (from `gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical()`) and counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' (from `gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical_count()`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' The function produces additional summary rows for the higher level nesting

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' variables providing both rates and counts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' When a hierarchical summary is filtered, the summary rows no longer provide

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' useful/consistent information.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' When creating a filtered summary, use `gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical()` or

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' `gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical_count()` directly, followed by a call to

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' `gtsummary::filter_hierarchical()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::add_overall.tbl_hierarchical

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param variables ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   Hierarchical variables to summarize. Must be 2 or 3 variables.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   Typical inputs are `c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD)` for an SOC/AE summary

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'   or `c(AEBODSYS, AEHLT, AEDECOD)` for an SOC/HLT/AE summary.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variables must be specified in the nesting order.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @param digits ([`formula-list-selector`][gtsummary::syntax])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'  Specifies how summary statistics are rounded. Values may be either integer(s) or function(s).

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'  If a theme is applied, the `digits` specifications of the theme is applied.

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label_overall_rate (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'  String for the overall rate summary. Default is

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'  `"Total number of participants with at least one adverse event"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label_overall_count (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'  String for the overall count summary. Default is

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'  `"Overall total number of events"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label_rate (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'  String for the rate summary. Default is `"Overall total number of events"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'  `"Total number of participants with at least one adverse event"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label_count (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'  String for the overall count summary. Default is `"Total number of events"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' @param sort

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   _Optional_ arguments passed to `gtsummary::sort_hierarchical(sort)`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   a stratified 'tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count' table

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns a gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @name tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf identical(Sys.getenv("NOT_CRAN"), "true") || identical(Sys.getenv("IN_PKGDOWN"), "true")

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' cards::ADAE[c(1, 2, 3, 8, 16), ] |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count(

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'     variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD),

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'     denominator = cards::ADSL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = TRTA

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_overall(last = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
                                            variables,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
                                            denominator,

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
                                            by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
                                            id = "USUBJID",

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
                                            label = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
                                            digits = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
                                            sort = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
                                            label_overall_rate = "Total number of participants with at least one adverse event",

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
                                            label_overall_count = "Overall total number of events",

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
                                            label_rate = "Total number of participants with at least one adverse event",

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
                                            label_count = "Total number of events") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    12x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(variables)

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(denominator)

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    12x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    12x
                    
                      
    data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    12x
                    
                      
    variables = {{ variables }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    12x
                    
                      
    by = {{ by }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    12x
                    
                      
    id = {{ id }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    12x
                    
                      
  if (!length(variables) %in% seq(2, 3)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    2x
                    
                      
    msg_pt1 <- "The {.arg variables} argument must select 2 or 3 columns"

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (length(variables) == 1L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    1x
                    
                      
      cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    1x
                    
                      
        c(msg_pt1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    1x
                    
                      
          i = "For a single variable summary, use {.code gtsummary::hierarchical(variables={.val {variables}})}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    1x
                    
                      
      c(msg_pt1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    1x
                    
                      
        i = "Columns select are typically {.code c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD)} or {.code c(AEBODSYS, AEHLT, AEDECOD)}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(by, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
  # saving function inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
  # process labels -------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    10x
                    
                      
  df_variables <- data[variables] |> dplyr::mutate(..ard_hierarchical_overall.. = data[[variables[1]]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
  # add a default label to the overall row - we update it later to say counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    10x
                    
                      
  attr(df_variables[["..ard_hierarchical_overall.."]], "label") <- label_overall_rate

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    10x
                    
                      
  cards::process_formula_selectors(df_variables, label = label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
  # fill in unspecified labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    10x
                    
                      
  cards::fill_formula_selectors(

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    10x
                    
                      
    df_variables,

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    10x
                    
                      
    label = lapply(names(df_variables), \(x) attr(df_variables[[x]], "label") %||% x) |> stats::setNames(names(df_variables))

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
  # build AE rates table -------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_rates <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical(

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    10x
                    
                      
      data = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    10x
                    
                      
      variables = all_of(variables),

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    10x
                    
                      
      include = all_of(variables),

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    10x
                    
                      
      by = all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    10x
                    
                      
      denominator = denominator,

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    10x
                    
                      
      id = all_of(id),

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    10x
                    
                      
      overall_row = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    10x
                    
                      
      label = label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    10x
                    
                      
      digits = digits

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::remove_footnote_header()

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
  # apply sort if specified by user

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    10x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(sort)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    2x
                    
                      
    tbl_rates <- tbl_rates |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    2x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::sort_hierarchical(sort = sort)

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
  # finally, add the row numbers

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_rates <- gtsummary::modify_table_body(tbl_rates, ~ dplyr::mutate(.x, ord = dplyr::row_number()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
  # build AE counts table ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_count <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical_count(

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    10x
                    
                      
      data = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    10x
                    
                      
      variables = all_of(variables),

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    10x
                    
                      
      include = all_of(variables),

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    10x
                    
                      
      by = all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    10x
                    
                      
      overall_row = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    10x
                    
                      
      label = label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    10x
                    
                      
      digits = tbl_rates$inputs$digits

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
  # if a sort occurred, merge in the tbl_rates$table_body, to put rows in same order

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    10x
                    
                      
  if (!is.null(sort)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    # get the merge variables

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    2x
                    
                      
    merge_vars <- tbl_rates$table_body |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::select(cards::all_ard_groups(), cards::all_ard_variables()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    2x
                    
                      
      names() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    2x
                    
                      
      union(c("row_type", "label"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
    # merge in the tbl_rates to remove removed rows/re-order rows to match tbl_rates

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    2x
                    
                      
    tbl_count$table_body <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    2x
                    
                      
      dplyr::left_join(

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    2x
                    
                      
        tbl_rates$table_body[merge_vars],

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    2x
                    
                      
        tbl_count$table_body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    2x
                    
                      
        by = merge_vars

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_count <- tbl_count |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
    # save row order and remove AE level counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    10x
                    
                      
      ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    10x
                    
                      
          ord = dplyr::row_number()

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::filter(!.data$variable %in% rev(.env$variables)[1])

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
    # relabel the overall counts row

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    10x
                    
                      
      ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    10x
                    
                      
          label =

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    10x
                    
                      
            ifelse(

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    10x
                    
                      
              .data$label == label_overall_rate,

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    10x
                    
                      
              label_overall_count,

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    10x
                    
                      
              .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
  # combine rates and counts into single table ---------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_final <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    10x
                    
                      
    tbl_rates |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    10x
                    
                      
      \(table_body) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::bind_rows(

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
          # these are the blank rows with the SOC/HLT label

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    10x
                    
                      
          dplyr::select(table_body, -gtsummary::all_stat_cols()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    10x
                    
                      
            dplyr::filter(.data$variable %in% rev(.env$variables)[-1]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
          # these are the rows with all the AE rates on them.

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
          #    the first row below the SOC/HLT header is renamed to `label_rate`

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    10x
                    
                      
          dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    10x
                    
                      
            table_body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    10x
                    
                      
            .by = cards::all_ard_groups(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    10x
                    
                      
            label =

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    10x
                    
                      
              ifelse(

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    10x
                    
                      
                .data$group1 %in% .env$variables[1] & dplyr::row_number() == 1L,

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    10x
                    
                      
                label_rate,

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    10x
                    
                      
                .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    
                    
                      
          # these are the rows with the counts. We only report the SOC/HLT counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    10x
                    
                      
          tbl_count$table_body |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    10x
                    
                      
            dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    10x
                    
                      
              label =

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    10x
                    
                      
                ifelse(

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    10x
                    
                      
                  .data$variable %in% rev(.env$variables)[-1],

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    10x
                    
                      
                  label_count,

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    10x
                    
                      
                  .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
                )

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    10x
                    
                      
          dplyr::arrange(.data$ord)

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
    # indent the SOC overall stats

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_indent(

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    10x
                    
                      
      columns = "label",

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    10x
                    
                      
      rows = .data$variable %in% .env$variables[1] & .data$label %in% c(label_rate, label_count)

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
    # indent the HLT overall stats (if not present, nothing will happen)

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_indent(

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    10x
                    
                      
      columns = "label",

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    10x
                    
                      
      rows = .data$variable %in% .env$variables[-c(1L, length(.env$variables))] & .data$label %in% c(label_rate, label_count),

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    10x
                    
                      
      indent = 8L

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      
    # convert "0 (0.0%)" to "0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    10x
                    
                      
    modify_zero_recode()

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
  # return final table ---------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_final$call_list <- list(tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count = match.call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_final$cards <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    10x
                    
                      
    list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    10x
                    
                      
      tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count =

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    10x
                    
                      
        list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    10x
                    
                      
          tbl_hierarchical = tbl_rates$cards$tbl_hierarchical,

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    10x
                    
                      
          tbl_hierarchical_count = tbl_count$cards$tbl_hierarchical_count

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_final$inputs <- tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl_final |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    10x
                    
                      
    structure(class = c("tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count", "gtsummary")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    10x
                    
                      
    modify_header_rm_md()

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      
add_overall.tbl_hierarchical_rate_and_count <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
                                                        last = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
                                                        col_label = "All Participants  \n(N = {style_roche_number(N)})", ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    5x
                    
                      
  do.call(

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    5x
                    
                      
    what = asNamespace("gtsummary")[["add_overall.tbl_hierarchical"]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    5x
                    
                      
    args = list(x = x, last = last, col_label = col_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' @describeIn tbl_survfit_times

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Adds survival differences between groups as additional rows to tables created by [`tbl_survfit_times()`].

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' Difference statistics are calculated using [cardx::ard_survival_survfit_diff()]

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' for all `tbl_survfit_times(times)` variable values, using `survfit` formula:

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' ```r

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' survival::survfit(y ~ by, data = data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' where `y`, `by` and `data` are the inputs of the same names to the `tbl_survfit_times()` object `x`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' Pairwise differences are calculated relative to the specified `by` variable's specified reference level.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::add_difference.tbl_summary

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param reference (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   Value of the `tbl_survfit_times(by)` variable value that is the reference for

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'   each of the difference calculations. For factors, use the character

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   level. The reference column will appear as the leftmost column in the table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @param pvalue_fun (`function`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'   Function to round and format the `p.value` statistic. Default is [label_roche_pvalue()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   The function must have a numeric vector input, and return a string that is the

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   rounded/formatted p-value (e.g. `pvalue_fun = label_style_pvalue(digits = 3)`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @order 3

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 2 - Survival Differences -----------

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_survfit_times(

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = cards::ADTTE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   times = c(30, 60),

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'   label = "Day {time}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_difference_row(reference = "Placebo")

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
add_difference_row.tbl_survfit_times <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
                                                 reference,

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
                                                 statistic = c("{estimate}", "({conf.low}, {conf.high})", "{p.value}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
                                                 conf.level = 0.95,

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
                                                 pvalue_fun = label_roche_pvalue(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
                                                 estimate_fun = label_roche_number(digits = 2, scale = 100),

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
                                                 ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    6x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_dots_empty(call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(reference)

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_string(reference)

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_range(conf.level, range = c(0, 1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_class(statistic, "character")

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_class(pvalue_fun, "function")

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    6x
                    
                      
  check_class(estimate_fun, "function")

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
  # check that input `x` has a `by` var with 2+ levels

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (is_empty(x$inputs$by)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    1x
                    
                      
      "Cannot run {.fun add_difference_row} when {.code tbl_survfit_times()} does not include a {.arg by} argument.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    5x
                    
                      
  lst_by_levels <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    5x
                    
                      
    x$table_styling$header |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    5x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(grepl(pattern = "^stat_\\d*[1-9]\\d*$", x = .data$column)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    5x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select("column", "modify_stat_level") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    5x
                    
                      
    deframe() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    5x
                    
                      
    lapply(FUN = as.character)

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
  # check reference level is appropriate

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (!as.character(reference) %in% unlist(lst_by_levels)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    1x
                    
                      
      "The {.arg reference} argument must be one of {.val {unlist(lst_by_levels)}}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
  # get function inputs --------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    4x
                    
                      
  func_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    4x
                    
                      
  by <- x$inputs$by

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    4x
                    
                      
  y <- x$inputs$y

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    4x
                    
                      
  times <- x$inputs$times

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    4x
                    
                      
  data <- x$inputs$data

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    4x
                    
                      
  form <- glue("{y} ~ {cardx::bt(by)}") |> stats::as.formula()

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
  # add reference level to the first position in factor

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    4x
                    
                      
  data[[by]] <- fct_relevel(data[[by]], reference, after = 0L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    4x
                    
                      
  ref_col <- names(lst_by_levels)[lst_by_levels == reference]

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
  # move reference column to first position in `x`

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    4x
                    
                      
  x <- x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    4x
                    
                      
      ~ .x |> dplyr::relocate(all_of(ref_col), .after = "label")

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  # calculate survival difference ----------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    4x
                    
                      
  survfit_diff_ard_fun <- function(data, variable, ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    16x
                    
                      
    cardx::ard_survival_survfit_diff(

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    16x
