      x = rlang::inject(survival::survfit(!!form, data = data)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    16x
                    
                      
      times = as.numeric(variable),

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    16x
                    
                      
      conf.level = conf.level

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    16x
                    
                      
      dplyr::filter(!.data$stat_name %in% c("method", "reference_level"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  # difference to be calculated for each time

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    4x
                    
                      
  for (t in times) data[[as.character(t)]] <- NA

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
  # create difference rows

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    4x
                    
                      
  tbl_surv_diff <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    4x
                    
                      
    data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
    # create dummy table to add difference rows to

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_summary(by = any_of(by), include = as.character(times), missing = "no") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::add_difference_row(

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    4x
                    
                      
      reference = reference,

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    4x
                    
                      
      statistic = everything() ~ statistic,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    4x
                    
                      
      test = everything() ~ survfit_diff_ard_fun,

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    4x
                    
                      
      conf.level = conf.level,

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    4x
                    
                      
      pvalue_fun = pvalue_fun,

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    4x
                    
                      
      estimate_fun = everything() ~ estimate_fun

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
  # build gtsummary table ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    4x
                    
                      
  tbl_surv_diff <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    4x
                    
                      
    tbl_surv_diff |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
    # remove time labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    4x
                    
                      
      ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
        # remove dummy table label rows

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    4x
                    
                      
        dplyr::filter(row_type != "label") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    4x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
          # match variable names to `x`

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    4x
                    
                      
          variable = paste0("time", .data$variable),

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
          # add default labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    4x
                    
                      
          label = dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    4x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "Survival Difference" ~ "Difference in Event Free Rates",

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    4x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "(CI Lower Bound, CI Upper Bound)" ~ glue("{style_roche_number(conf.level, scale = 100)}% CI"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    4x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "p-value" ~ "p-value (Z-test)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    4x
                    
                      
            .default = .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
    # indent rows

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_indent(columns = "label", rows = .data$row_type == "difference_row", indent = 8L) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_indent(columns = "label", rows = .data$label == "Difference in Event Free Rates", indent = 4L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
  # remove ARD for dummy table rows

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    4x
                    
                      
  tbl_surv_diff$cards$tbl_summary <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
  # add difference rows into tbl_survfit_times table

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    4x
                    
                      
  x <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_stack(

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    4x
                    
                      
      tbls = list(x, tbl_surv_diff),

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    4x
                    
                      
      quiet = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
    # move survival difference rows under each section for each matching survival time

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    4x
                    
                      
      \(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    4x
                    
                      
        x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    4x
                    
                      
          dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    4x
                    
                      
            variable_f = factor(gsub("-row_difference", "", .data$variable), levels = unique(x$variable)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    4x
                    
                      
            idx_row = dplyr::row_number()

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
          ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    4x
                    
                      
          dplyr::arrange(dplyr::pick("variable_f", "idx_row")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    4x
                    
                      
          dplyr::select(-"variable_f", -"idx_row")

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
  # add info to table ----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    4x
                    
                      
  x$call_list <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    4x
                    
                      
    "tbl_survfit_times" = x$tbls[[1]]$call_list,

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    4x
                    
                      
    "add_difference_row" = match.call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    4x
                    
                      
  x$cards <- lapply(x$tbls, \(x) x$cards) |> unlist(recursive = FALSE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    4x
                    
                      
  x$inputs <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    4x
                    
                      
    "tbl_survfit_times" = x$tbls[[1]]$inputs,

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    4x
                    
                      
    "add_difference_row" = func_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    4x
                    
                      
  x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    4x
                    
                      
    structure(class = c("tbl_survfit_times", "gtsummary"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Remove Markdown Syntax from Header

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Remove markdown syntax (e.g. double star for bold, underscore for italic, etc)

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' from the headers and spanning headers of a gtsummary table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`gtsummary`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'   A gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param md (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'   Must be one or more of `'bold'` and `'italic'`. Default is `'bold'`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param type (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'   Must be one or more of `'star'` and `'underscore'`. Default is `'star'`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = cards::ADSL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   include = AGE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = ARM,

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   nonmissing = "always"

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_header_rm_md()

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
modify_header_rm_md <- function(x, md = "bold", type = "star") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    101x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    101x
                    
                      
  check_class(x, "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    101x
                    
                      
  md <- arg_match(md, multiple = TRUE, values = c("bold", "italic"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    101x
                    
                      
  type <- arg_match(type, multiple = TRUE, values = c("star", "underscore"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
  # process inputs -------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
  # styler: off

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    101x
                    
                      
  patterns <- character(0L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    100x
                    
                      
  if (md == "bold" && type == "star") patterns <- c(patterns, "\\*\\*(.*?)\\*\\*")

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    !
                    
                      
  if (md == "bold" && type == "underscore") patterns <- c(patterns, "__(.*?)__")

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    !
                    
                      
  if (md == "italic" && type == "star") patterns <- c(patterns, "\\*(.*?)\\*")

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (md == "italic" && type == "underscore") patterns <- c(patterns, "_(.*?)_")

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
  # styler: on

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
  # remove markdown syntax and return table ------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    101x
                    
                      
  .strip_md(x, patterns)

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
.strip_md <- function(x, patterns) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
  # cycle over the patterns and make the replacements --------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    101x
                    
                      
  for (pattern in patterns) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    101x
                    
                      
    x$table_styling$header$label <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    101x
                    
                      
      x$table_styling$header$label |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    101x
                    
                      
      str_replace_all(pattern = pattern, replacement = "\\1")

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    101x
                    
                      
    x$table_styling$spanning_header$spanning_header <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    101x
                    
                      
      x$table_styling$spanning_header$spanning_header |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    101x
                    
                      
      str_replace_all(pattern = pattern, replacement = "\\1")

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
  # return table ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    101x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Survival Times

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Create a gtsummary table with Kaplan-Meier estimated survival estimates

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' and specified times.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams tbl_survfit_quantiles

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams cardx::ard_survival_survfit

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::add_overall.tbl_summary

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   Label to appear in the header row. Default is `"Time {time}"`, where

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'   the glue syntax injects the time estimate into the label.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param statistic (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   Character vector of the statistics to report.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   May use any of the following statistics:

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   `c(n.risk, estimate, std.error, conf.low, conf.high)`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default is `c("{n.risk}", "{estimate}", "({conf.low}, {conf.high})")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   Statistics available to include when using `add_difference_row()` are:

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"estimate"`, `"std.error"`, `"statistic"`, `"conf.low"`, `"conf.high"`, `"p.value"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param estimate_fun (`function`) \cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   Function used to style/round the `c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high)` statistics.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`tbl_survfit_times`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   A stratified 'tbl_survfit_times' object

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' When the `statistic` argument is modified, the statistic labels will likely

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' also need to be updated. To change the label, call the `modify_table_body()`

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' function to directly update the underlying `x$table_body` data frame.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns a gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @name tbl_survfit_times

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' @order 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_survfit_times(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = cards::ADTTE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   times = c(30, 60),

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   label = "Day {time}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_overall()

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_survfit_times

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' @order 2

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
tbl_survfit_times <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
                              times,

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
                              y = "survival::Surv(time = AVAL, event = 1 - CNSR, type = 'right', origin = 0)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
                              by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
                              label = "Time {time}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
                              statistic = c("{n.risk}", "{estimate}", "({conf.low}, {conf.high})"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
                              estimate_fun = label_roche_number(digits = 1, scale = 100),

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
                              method.args = list(conf.int = 0.95)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    12x
                    
                      
  method.args <- enquo(method.args)

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    12x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(times)

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_numeric(times)

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_range(times, range = c(0, Inf))

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_string(label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_class(statistic, "character")

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_class(estimate_fun, "function")

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    12x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data, by = {{ by }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(by, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    11x
                    
                      
  if ("time" %in% by) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    1x
                    
                      
      "The {.arg by} column cannot be named {.val time}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    10x
                    
                      
  y <- .expr_as_string({{ y }}) # convert y to string (if not already)

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    10x
                    
                      
  func_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
  # subset data on complete row ------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    10x
                    
                      
  form <- glue("{y} ~ {ifelse(is_empty(by), 1, cardx::bt(by))}") |> stats::as.formula()

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    10x
                    
                      
  data <- data[stats::complete.cases(data[all.vars(form)]), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  # get survival quantiles -----------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    10x
                    
                      
  ard_surv_times <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    10x
                    
                      
    cardx::ard_survival_survfit(

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    10x
                    
                      
      x = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    10x
                    
                      
      y = y,

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    10x
                    
                      
      variables = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    10x
                    
                      
      times = times,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    10x
                    
                      
      method.args = !!method.args

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    10x
                    
                      
    cards::update_ard_fmt_fun(

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    10x
                    
                      
      stat_names = c("estimate", "conf.low", "conf.high"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    10x
                    
                      
      fmt_fun = estimate_fun

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    10x
                    
                      
    cards::update_ard_fmt_fun(

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    10x
                    
                      
      stat_names = c("n.risk", "n.censor", "cum.risk", "cum.censor"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    10x
                    
                      
      fmt_fun = label_roche_number()

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
  # calculate ARD for by vars

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    10x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(by)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    5x
                    
                      
    ard_by <- cards::ard_tabulate(data, variables = all_of(by))

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    10x
                    
                      
  ard_n <- cards::ard_total_n(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
  # get the confidence level

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    10x
                    
                      
  conf.level <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    10x
                    
                      
    ard_surv_times |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    10x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(.data$stat_name == "conf.level") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    10x
                    
                      
    dplyr::pull("stat") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    10x
                    
                      
    unlist()

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
  # build gtsummary table ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    10x
                    
                      
    dplyr::bind_rows(

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    10x
                    
                      
      ard_surv_times |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
        # remove model-wide stats

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "time") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    10x
                    
                      
          variable = paste0(.data$variable, unlist(.data$variable_level)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    10x
                    
                      
          variable_level = NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    10x
                    
                      
      case_switch(!is_empty(by) ~ ard_by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    10x
                    
                      
      ard_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_ard_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    10x
                    
                      
      by = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    10x
                    
                      
      type = starts_with("time") ~ "continuous2",

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    10x
                    
                      
      statistic = starts_with("time") ~ statistic,

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    10x
                    
                      
      label =

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    10x
                    
                      
        map(times, ~ glue::glue_data(list(time = .x), label)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    10x
                    
                      
          set_names(paste0("time", times))

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    10x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "{level}  \n(N = {n})",

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    10x
                    
                      
      label = ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    10x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    10x
                    
                      
      ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    10x
                    
                      
          label = dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    10x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "Number of Subjects at Risk" ~ "Patients remaining at risk",

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    10x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "Survival Probability" ~ "Event Free Rate (%)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    10x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "(CI Lower Bound, CI Upper Bound)" ~ glue("{style_roche_number(conf.level, scale = 100)}% CI"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    10x
                    
                      
            .default = .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
  # return tbl -----------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl$cards <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    10x
                    
                      
    list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    10x
                    
                      
      tbl_survfit_times =

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    10x
                    
                      
        dplyr::bind_rows(

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    10x
                    
                      
          ard_surv_times,

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    10x
                    
                      
          if (!is_empty(by)) ard_by,  # styler: off

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    10x
                    
                      
          ard_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl[["call_list"]] <- list(tbl_survfit_times = match.call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl$inputs <- func_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    10x
                    
                      
  tbl |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    10x
                    
                      
    structure(class = c("tbl_survfit_times", "gtsummary"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_survfit_times

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
add_overall.tbl_survfit_times <- add_overall.tbl_survfit_quantiles

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Roche Summary Table

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' This is a thin wrapper of [`gtsummary::tbl_summary()`] with the following differences:

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' - Default summary type for continuous variables is `'continuous2'`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' - Number of non-missing observations, when requested, is added for each variable

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'   and placed on the row under the variable label/header.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' - The `tbl_summary(missing*)` arguments have been renamed to

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'   `tbl_roche_summary(nonmissing*)` with updated default values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' - The default footnotes from `tbl_summary()` are removed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' - Cells with `"0 (0.0%)"` are converted to `"0"` with `gtsummary::modify_post_fmt_fun()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::tbl_summary

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @param nonmissing,nonmissing_text,nonmissing_stat

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   Arguments dictating how and if missing values are presented:

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `nonmissing`: must be one of `c("always", "ifany", "no")`

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `nonmissing_text`: string indicating text shown on non-missing row. Default is `"n"`

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `nonmissing_stat`: statistic to show on non-missing row. Default is `"{N_nonmiss}"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'     Possible values are `N_nonmiss`, `N_miss`, `N_obs`, `p_nonmiss` `p_miss`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @return a 'gtsummary' table

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = trt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'     include = c(age, grade),

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'     nonmissing = "always"

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_overall()

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
tbl_roche_summary <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
                              by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
                              label = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
                              statistic =

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
                                list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
                                  gtsummary::all_continuous() ~ c("{mean} ({sd})", "{median}", "{min} - {max}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
                                  gtsummary::all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
                                ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
                              digits = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
                              type = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
                              value = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
                              nonmissing = c("no", "always", "ifany"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
                              nonmissing_text = "n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
                              nonmissing_stat = "{N_nonmiss}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
                              sort = gtsummary::all_categorical(FALSE) ~ "alphanumeric",

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
                              percent = c("column", "row", "cell"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
                              include = everything()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    86x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    86x
                    
                      
  if (is.character(percent)) percent <- arg_match(percent, error_call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    86x
                    
                      
  nonmissing <- arg_match(nonmissing, error_call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
  # execute `tbl_summary()` code with theme/defaults ---------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    86x
                    
                      
  x <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    86x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::with_gtsummary_theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    86x
                    
                      
      x = tbl_roche_summary_theme(data, {{ include }}),

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    86x
                    
                      
      expr =

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    86x
                    
                      
        gtsummary::tbl_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    86x
                    
                      
          data = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    86x
                    
                      
          by = {{ by }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    86x
                    
                      
          label = label,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    86x
                    
                      
          statistic = statistic,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    86x
                    
                      
          digits = digits,

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    86x
                    
                      
          type = type,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    86x
                    
                      
          value = value,

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    86x
                    
                      
          missing = nonmissing,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    86x
                    
                      
          missing_text = nonmissing_text,

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    86x
                    
                      
          missing_stat = nonmissing_stat,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    86x
                    
                      
          sort = sort,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    86x
                    
                      
          percent = percent,

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    86x
                    
                      
          include = {{ include }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    86x
                    
                      
      msg_ignored_elements =

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    86x
                    
                      
        paste(

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    86x
                    
                      
          "Theme element(s) {.val {elements}} utilized internally",

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    86x
                    
                      
          "by {.code tbl_roche_summary()} and cannot be modified.\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    86x
                    
                      
          "Use {.code gtsummary::tbl_summary()} if you",

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    86x
                    
                      
          "wish to modify these theme elements."

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
    # remove default footnote

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    86x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::remove_footnote_header(columns = everything()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
    # remove the default "Characteristic" header, remove bold from stat headers

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    86x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    86x
                    
                      
      label = "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    86x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "{level}  \n(N = {n})"

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
    # convert "0 (0.0%)" to "0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    86x
                    
                      
    modify_zero_recode() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
    # sort the missing row to just below the header row

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    86x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    86x
                    
                      
      function(.x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    86x
                    
                      
        .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    86x
                    
                      
          dplyr::arrange(

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
            # retain variable order (arrange() forces alphanumeric sorting)

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    86x
                    
                      
            match(.data$variable, unique(.data$variable)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    86x
                    
                      
            .data$row_type != "label", # first

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    86x
                    
                      
            .data$row_type != "missing" # second

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
    # assign class

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    86x
                    
                      
    structure(class = c("tbl_roche_summary", "tbl_summary", "gtsummary"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
  # return table ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    86x
                    
                      
  x$inputs$missing <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    86x
                    
                      
  x$inputs$missing_stat <- NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    86x
                    
                      
  x$inputs$missing_text <- NULL
