  list(my_stat = val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    397
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    398
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    399
                    
                    
                      
.get_diff_se <- function(data, digits, ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    400
                    19x
                    
                      
  val <- if (nrow(data) == 0 || isTRUE(is.na(data$estimate_contr[1]))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    401
                    
                    
                      
    ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    402
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    403
                    10x
                    
                      
    sprintf(paste0("%.", digits[1], "f (%.", digits[2], "f)"), data$estimate_contr[1], data$se_contr[1])

                    		
                  

                  

                    404
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    405
                    19x
                    
                      
  list(my_stat = val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    406
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    407
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    408
                    
                    
                      
.get_diff_ci <- function(data, digits, ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    409
                    19x
                    
                      
  val <- if (nrow(data) == 0 || isTRUE(is.na(data$lower_cl_contr[1]))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    410
                    
                    
                      
    ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    411
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    412
                    10x
                    
                      
    sprintf(paste0("(%.", digits[1], "f, %.", digits[1], "f)"), data$lower_cl_contr[1], data$upper_cl_contr[1])

                    		
                  

                  

                    413
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    414
                    19x
                    
                      
  list(my_stat = val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    415
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    416
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    417
                    
                    
                      
.get_pval <- function(data, digits, ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    418
                    20x
                    
                      
  val <- if (nrow(data) == 0 || isTRUE(is.na(data$p_value[1]))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    419
                    
                    
                      
    ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    420
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    421
                    11x
                    
                      
    pval <- data$p_value[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    422
                    11x
                    
                      
    cutoff <- 10^(-digits[3])

                    		
                  

                  

                    423
                    11x
                    
                      
    if (isTRUE(pval < cutoff)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    424
                    5x
                    
                      
      paste0("<", format(cutoff, scientific = FALSE, trim = TRUE))

                    		
                  

                  

                    425
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    426
                    6x
                    
                      
      sprintf(paste0("%.", digits[3], "f"), pval)

                    		
                  

                  

                    427
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    428
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    429
                    20x
                    
                      
  list(my_stat = val)

                    		
                  

                  

                    430
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Generate Table of Pairwise Cox-PH and Log-Rank Results

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' This function performs pairwise comparisons of treatment arms using the **Cox Proportional Hazards model** and

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' calculates the corresponding **log-rank p-value**. Each comparison tests a non-reference group against a specified

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' reference group.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param model_formula (`formula`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'   A `formula` object specifying the survival model, typically in the form `Surv(time, status) ~ arm + covariates`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'   A `data.frame` containing the survival data, including time, status, and the arm variable.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param arm (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   A single character string specifying the name of the column in `data` that contains the grouping/treatment

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   **arm variable**. This column **must be a factor** for correct stratification and comparison.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param ref_group (`character` or `NULL`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   A single character string specifying the level of the `arm` variable to be used as the **reference group** for

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'   all pairwise comparisons. If `NULL` (the default), the **first unique level** of the `arm` column is automatically

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   selected as the reference group.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A `data.frame` with the results of the pairwise comparisons. The columns include:

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' \itemize{

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item `arm`: (rownames of the `data.frame`) The comparison arm (group) being tested against the reference group.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item `hr`: The Hazard Ratio (HR) for the comparison arm vs. the reference arm, formatted to two decimal places.

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item `ci`: The 95% confidence interval for the HR, presented as a string in the format "(lower, upper)", with

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'     values formatted to two decimal places.

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   \item `pval`: The log-rank p-value for the comparison.

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' }

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @details The function iterates through each unique arm (excluding the reference group). For each iteration, it

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   filters the data to include only the current comparison arm and the reference arm, and then:

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   \itemize{

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'     \item Fits a Cox model using `survival::coxph`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'     \item Performs a log-rank test using `survival::survdiff`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   }

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'   The Hazard Ratio and its 95% confidence interval are extracted from the Cox model summary, and the p-value is

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   extracted from the log-rank test.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @seealso `annotate_gg_km()`, `gg_km()`, and the `survival` package functions `survival::coxph` and

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   `survival::survdiff`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example data setup (assuming 'time' is event time, 'status' is event indicator (1=event),

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' # and 'arm' is the treatment group)

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' library(dplyr) # For better data handling

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' # Prepare data in a modern dplyr-friendly way

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' surv_data <- survival::lung |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'   mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'     arm = factor(sample(c("A", "B", "C"), n(), replace = TRUE)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'     status = status - 1 # Convert status to 0/1

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   filter(if_all(everything(), ~ !is.na(.)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' formula <- survival::Surv(time, status) ~ arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' results_tbl <- get_cox_pairwise_df(

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'   model_formula = formula,

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = surv_data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm = "arm",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'   ref_group = "A"

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' print(results_tbl)

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
get_cox_pairwise_df <- function(model_formula, data, arm, ref_group = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    1x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
  # Input checks

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (!rlang::is_formula(model_formula)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    !
                    
                      
      "{.arg model_formula} must be a {.cls formula}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    !
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    1x
                    
                      
  if (!is.factor(data[[arm]])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    !
                    
                      
      "Column {.arg {data}[[\"{.var {arm}}\"]]} must be a {.cls factor}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
  # Determine reference and comparison groups

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    1x
                    
                      
  ref_group <- if (!is.null(ref_group)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    !
                    
                      
    ref_group

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    1x
                    
                      
    levels(data[[arm]])[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    1x
                    
                      
  comp_group <- setdiff(levels(data[[arm]]), ref_group)

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    1x
                    
                      
  ret <- c()

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    1x
                    
                      
  for (current_arm in comp_group) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    2x
                    
                      
    subset_arm <- c(ref_group, current_arm)

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    2x
                    
                      
    if (length(subset_arm) != 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    !
                    
                      
      cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    !
                    
                      
        "{.arg subset_arm} must contain exactly 2 arms/groups (current length is {length(subset_arm)}).",

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    !
                    
                      
        call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    2x
                    
                      
    comp_df <- data[as.character(data[[arm]]) %in% subset_arm, ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    2x
                    
                      
    suppressWarnings(

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    2x
                    
                      
      coxph_ans <- coxph(formula = model_formula, data = comp_df) |> summary()

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    2x
                    
                      
    orginal_survdiff <- survdiff(formula = model_formula, data = comp_df)

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    2x
                    
                      
    log_rank_pvalue <- 1 - stats::pchisq(orginal_survdiff$chisq, length(orginal_survdiff$n) - 1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    2x
                    
                      
    current_row <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    2x
                    
                      
      hr = sprintf("%.2f", coxph_ans$conf.int[1, 1]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    2x
                    
                      
      ci = paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
        "(",

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    2x
                    
                      
        sprintf("%.2f", coxph_ans$conf.int[1, 3]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
        ", ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    2x
                    
                      
        sprintf("%.2f", coxph_ans$conf.int[1, 4]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
        ")"

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    2x
                    
                      
      pval = log_rank_pvalue

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    2x
                    
                      
    rownames(current_row) <- current_arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    2x
                    
                      
    ret <- rbind(ret, current_row)

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    1x
                    
                      
  names(ret) <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    1x
                    
                      
    "HR",

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    1x
                    
                      
    "95% CI",

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    1x
                    
                      
    "p-value (log-rank)"

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    1x
                    
                      
  ret

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Add a Forest Plot Column to a gtsummary Table

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' This function adds a forest plot column to a gtsummary table, typically produced

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' by [tbl_roche_subgroups()]. The forest plot visualizes estimates and confidence intervals

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' for each subgroup in the table. The function supports rendering with either the `gt`

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' or `flextable` engines, making it suitable for different outputs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`gtsummary`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'   A gtsummary table with estimates and confidence intervals in the table body. Usually produced

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   by [tbl_roche_subgroups()].

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param estimate ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   Estimate column name.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param conf_low ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   Confidence interval lower bound column name.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param conf_high ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'  Confidence interval upper bound column name.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param pvalue ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select], optional)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'  P-value column name. Point sizes in the forest plot will be scaled

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'  according to p-value (smaller p-values = smaller points). `NULL` to turn this off.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param after ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'  Column name after which the forest plot column will be added. Default is after

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'  the p-value column.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @param header_spaces (`integer`)\cr Spaces to add to the forest plot header to

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   visually separate the two treatment areas (`trt A\n Better` and `trt B\nBetter`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'   It is suggested to modify manually this variable if the treatment names are long,

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   with `add_forest(..., header_spaces = 5)` or `flextable::set_header_labels(ggplot = "*")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' @param table_engine (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'  Table rendering engine to use. Default is "flextable".

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' Both gt and flextable outputs could produce issues in line continuity between rows if

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' there are wrapping in the statistical cells.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @return a gt table or flextable object with an added forest plot column.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' # Simple example ------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   select(age, marker, grade, response) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_uvregression(

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'     y = response,

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'     method = glm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'     method.args = list(family = binomial),

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'     exponentiate = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'     hide_n = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_column_merge(

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'     pattern = "{estimate} (95% CI {ci}; {p.value})",

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#'     rows = !is.na(estimate)

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_header(estimate = "**Odds Ratio**") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_forest(table_engine = "gt")

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' # Realistic example ---------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#' trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_roche_subgroups(

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'     rsp = "response",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = "trt",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'     subgroups = c("grade"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'     ~ glm(response ~ trt, data = .x) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'       gtsummary::tbl_regression(

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'         show_single_row = trt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#'         exponentiate = TRUE # , tidy_fun = broom.helpers::tidy_parameters

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#'       )

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_forest(pvalue = starts_with("p.value"), table_engine = "flextable") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'   flextable::set_header_labels(ggplot = "---------")

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
add_forest <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
                       estimate = starts_with("estimate"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
                       conf_low = starts_with("conf.low"), conf_high = starts_with("conf.high"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
                       pvalue = starts_with("p.value"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
                       after = starts_with("p.value"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
                       header_spaces = 20,

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
                       table_engine = c("flextable", "gt")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    5x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(estimate)

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(conf_low)

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    5x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    5x
                    
                      
    x$table_body,

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    5x
                    
                      
    estimate = {{ estimate }}, conf_low = {{ conf_low }}, conf_high = {{ conf_high }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    5x
                    
                      
    pvalue = {{ pvalue }}, after = {{ after }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(estimate)

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(conf_low)

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(conf_high)

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(pvalue, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(after)

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    5x
                    
                      
  check_scalar_integerish(header_spaces)

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
  # 1. SETUP DEFAULTS ----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
  # Define two sets of sizes: "Huge" for GT (HTML) and "Standard" for Flextable (Word/PPT)

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    5x
                    
                      
  table_engine <- arg_match(table_engine, error_call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    5x
                    
                      
  sizes <- .get_default_forest_sizes(table_engine = table_engine)

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
  # 2. DATA PREP ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
  # Extract only finite numbers that are ALSO <= 999.99

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    5x
                    
                      
  fin_low <- x$table_body[[conf_low]][is.finite(x$table_body[[conf_low]]) & x$table_body[[conf_low]] <= 999.99]

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    5x
                    
                      
  fin_high <- x$table_body[[conf_high]][is.finite(x$table_body[[conf_high]]) & x$table_body[[conf_high]] <= 999.99]

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    5x
                    
                      
  fin_est <- x$table_body[[estimate]][is.finite(x$table_body[[estimate]]) & x$table_body[[estimate]] <= 999.99]

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  # Calculate limits (with fallbacks to prevent warnings if vectors are empty)

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    5x
                    
                      
  global_limits <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    5x
                    
                      
    if (length(fin_low) > 0 && min(fin_low) > 0) min(fin_low, 0.2) else 0.2, # at least 0.2 because of log scale

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    5x
                    
                      
    if (length(fin_high) > 0) max(fin_high, 1.2) else 2.0 # Default upper limit if all are filtered out

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    5x
                    
                      
  mean_estimate <- if (length(fin_est) > 0) mean(fin_est) else 1.0 # could be better NA_real_

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    5x
                    
                      
  global_margins <- margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 0, l = 5, unit = "pt")

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
  # 3. GENERATE PLOTS ----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    5x
                    
                      
  lst_ggplots <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    5x
                    
                      
    seq_len(nrow(x$table_body)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    5x
                    
                      
    map(

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    5x
                    
                      
      function(i) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
        # Handle missing estimates by creating an empty plot with just reference lines

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    24x
                    
                      
        if (.is_na_or_chr(x, i, estimate, conf_low, conf_high)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
          # Create an empty plot with just the reference lines

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    8x
                    
                      
          out <- ggplot2::ggplot() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    8x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = mean_estimate, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    8x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    8x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0.2, linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    8x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::scale_x_log10(limits = global_limits) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    8x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::theme_void() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    8x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    8x
                    
                      
              axis.title = element_blank(), axis.line = element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    8x
                    
                      
              axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    8x
                    
                      
              plot.margin = global_margins

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    8x
                    
                      
          return(out)

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
        # Extract the row data

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    16x
                    
                      
        dt <- x$table_body[i, ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
        # Dots sizes

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    16x
                    
                      
        pvalue_size_i <- ifelse(

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    16x
                    
                      
          length(pvalue) > 0 && !is.null(dt[[pvalue]]) && !is.na(dt[[pvalue]]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    16x
                    
                      
          sizes$dot_max * dt[[pvalue]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    16x
                    
                      
          sizes$dot_base

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
        # Create the forest plot for this row

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    16x
                    
                      
        out <- dt |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    16x
                    
                      
          dplyr::mutate(y = 1L) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::ggplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    16x
                    
                      
            ggplot2::aes(

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    16x
                    
                      
              y = .data$y,

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    16x
                    
                      
              x = .data[[estimate]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    16x
                    
                      
              xmin = .data[[conf_low]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    16x
                    
                      
              xmax = .data[[conf_high]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
          ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::geom_errorbar(height = 0, linewidth = sizes$errorbar_size) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = mean_estimate, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0.2, linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::geom_point(size = pvalue_size_i, shape = 21, fill = "white", stroke = sizes$stroke) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::scale_x_log10(limits = global_limits) + # Ensure log scale matches axis!

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::theme_void() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    16x
                    
                      
          ggplot2::theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    16x
                    
                      
            axis.title = element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    16x
                    
                      
            axis.line = element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    16x
                    
                      
            axis.ticks = element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    16x
                    
                      
            axis.text = element_blank(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    16x
                    
                      
            plot.margin = global_margins

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    16x
                    
                      
        out

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
  # 4. CREATE AXIS & APPEND ----------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
  # Create the axis plot (using the function from the previous step)

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    5x
                    
                      
  p_axis <- .plot_centered_axis(limits = global_limits, mean_estimate = mean_estimate, sizes = sizes)

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
  # Append it to your list of plots

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    5x
                    
                      
  lst_ggplots_final <- c(lst_ggplots, list(p_axis))

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      
  # Extract the Spanning Headers from gtsummary metadata

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    5x
                    
                      
  header_text <- .determine_ggplot_header(x, header_spaces, table_engine)

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
  # 5. BUILD FINAL TABLE --------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    5x
                    
                      
  out <- x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    5x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    5x
                    
                      
      dplyr::add_row() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    5x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(ggplot = NA, .after = dplyr::all_of(after))) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    5x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_footnote(gtsummary::everything() ~ NA) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    5x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(ggplot = header_text)

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      
  # 6. RENDER TABLE -------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (table_engine == "gt") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    2x
                    
                      
    out <- out |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    2x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::as_gt() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    2x
                    
                      
      gt::text_transform(

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    2x
                    
                      
        locations = gt::cells_body(columns = .data$ggplot),

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    2x
                    
                      
        fn = function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    1x
                    
                      
          suppressMessages( # avoid `height` was translated to `width`. message

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    1x
                    
                      
            lst_ggplots_final |> gt::ggplot_image(height = gt::px(28), aspect_ratio = 8)

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
        }

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    2x
                    
                      
      gt::cols_width(ggplot ~ gt::px(250)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    2x
                    
                      
      gt::tab_options(

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    2x
                    
                      
        data_row.padding = gt::px(0),

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    2x
                    
                      
        table_body.hlines.style = "none",

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    2x
                    
                      
        table_body.vlines.style = "none"

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    2x
                    
                      
      gt::opt_css("

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    2x
                    
                      
        .gt_table img { display: block; vertical-align: bottom; margin: 0 auto; }

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
      ") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    2x
                    
                      
      gt::tab_style(style = gt::cell_text(whitespace = "nowrap"), locations = gt::cells_body())

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    3x
                    
                      
  } else if (table_engine == "flextable") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    3x
                    
                      
    out <- out |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    3x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::as_flex_table() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::mk_par(

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    3x
                    
                      
        j = "ggplot",

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    3x
                    
                      
        value = flextable::as_paragraph(

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    3x
                    
                      
          suppressMessages( # avoid `height` was translated to `width`. message

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    3x
                    
                      
            flextable::gg_chunk(value = lst_ggplots_final, height = 0.4, width = 2.5)

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::line_spacing(space = 0.8, part = "body") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::line_spacing(j = "ggplot", space = 0, part = "body") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::valign(valign = "center", part = "body") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::align(j = "ggplot", align = "center", part = "header") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::width(j = "ggplot", width = 2.5) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::padding(padding.top = 0, part = "body") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::padding(padding.bottom = 7, part = "body") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::padding(j = "ggplot", padding.bottom = 0, part = "body") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    3x
                    
                      
      flextable::valign(valign = "bottom", part = "body")

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    5x
                    
                      
  out

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    
                    
                      
.is_na_or_chr <- function(x, i, estimate, conf_low, conf_high) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    24x
                    
                      
  any(c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    24x
                    
                      
    is.na(x$table_body[[estimate]][i]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    24x
                    
                      
    is.na(x$table_body[[conf_low]][i]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    24x
                    
                      
    is.na(x$table_body[[conf_high]][i]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    24x
                    
                      
    is.character(x$table_body[[estimate]][i]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    24x
                    
                      
    is.character(x$table_body[[conf_low]][i]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    24x
                    
                      
    is.character(x$table_body[[conf_high]][i]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    24x
                    
                      
    x$table_body[[estimate]][i] > 999.99,

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    24x
                    
                      
    x$table_body[[conf_high]][i] > 999.99,

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    24x
                    
                      
    x$table_body[[conf_low]][i] > 999.99 # Needed?

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Create and Stack an X-Axis Aligned Table
