                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns a gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @name tbl_survfit_quantiles

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' @section ARD-first:

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' This function is a helper for creating a common summary.

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' But if you need to modify the appearance of this table, you may need to build

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' it from ARDs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' Here's the general outline for creating this table directly from ARDs.

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' 1. Create an ARD of survival quantiles using `cardx::ard_survival_survfit()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' 2. Construct an ARD of the minimum and maximum survival times using `cards::ard_summary()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' 3. Combine the ARDs and build summary table with `gtsummary::tbl_ard_summary()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' ```r

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' # get the survival quantiles with 95% CI

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' ard_surv_quantiles <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'   cardx::ard_survival_survfit(

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'     x = cards::ADTTE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'     y = survival::Surv(time = AVAL, event = 1 - CNSR, type = 'right', origin = 0),

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'     variables = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'     probs = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75)

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'   # modify the shape of the ARD to look like a

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'   # 'continuous' result to feed into `tbl_ard_summary()`

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'     stat_name = paste0(.data$stat_name, 100 * unlist(.data$variable_level)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'     variable_level = list(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' # get the min/max followup time

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' ard_surv_min_max <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'   cards::ard_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'     data = cards::ADTTE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'     variables = AVAL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#'     statistic = everything() ~ cards::continuous_summary_fns(c("min", "max"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' # stack the ARDs and pass them to `tbl_ard_summary()`

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#' cards::bind_ard(

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#'   ard_surv_quantiles,

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#'   ard_surv_min_max

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_ard_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'     type = list(prob = "continuous2", AVAL = "continuous"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#'     statistic = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'       prob = c("{estimate50}", "({conf.low50}, {conf.high50})", "{estimate25}, {estimate75}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#'       AVAL = "{min} to {max}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'     ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#'     label = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#'       prob = "Time to event",

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#'       AVAL = "Range"

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#'   # directly modify the labels in the table to match spec

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#'     ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#'       dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#'         label = dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#'           .data$label == "Survival Probability" ~ "Median",

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#'           .data$label == "(CI Lower Bound, CI Upper Bound)" ~ "95% CI",

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#'           .data$label == "Survival Probability, Survival Probability" ~ "25% and 75%-ile",

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#'           .default = .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#'         )

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#'       )

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#'   # update indentation to match spec

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_indent(columns = "label", rows = label == "95% CI", indent = 8L) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_indent(columns = "label", rows = .data$label == "Range", indent = 4L) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#'   # remove default footnotes

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#'   remove_footnote_header(columns = all_stat_cols())

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_survfit_quantiles(

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = cards::ADTTE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#'   estimate_fun = label_roche_number(digits = 1, na = "NE")

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_overall(last = TRUE, col_label = "**All Participants**  \nN = {n}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 2: unstratified analysis -----------

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_survfit_quantiles(data = cards::ADTTE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_survfit_quantiles

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
tbl_survfit_quantiles <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
                                  y = "survival::Surv(time = AVAL, event = 1 - CNSR, type = 'right', origin = 0)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
                                  by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
                                  header = "Time to event",

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
                                  estimate_fun = label_roche_number(digits = 1, na = "NE"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
                                  method.args = list(conf.int = 0.95)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    10x
                    
                      
  method.args <- enquo(method.args)

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    10x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_string(header)

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    10x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data, by = {{ by }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_class(estimate_fun, "function")

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    10x
                    
                      
  if (length(by) > 1L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    1x
                    
                      
      "The {.arg by} argument must be empty or a single stratifying variable name.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    9x
                    
                      
  if ("time" %in% by) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    1x
                    
                      
      "The {.arg by} column cannot be named {.val time}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    8x
                    
                      
  y <- .expr_as_string({{ y }}) # convert y to string (if not already)

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    8x
                    
                      
  func_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
  # subset data on complete row ------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    8x
                    
                      
  form <- glue("{y} ~ {ifelse(is_empty(by), 1, cardx::bt(by))}") |> stats::as.formula()

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    8x
                    
                      
  data <- data[stats::complete.cases(data[all.vars(form)]), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
  # get survival quantiles -----------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    8x
                    
                      
  ard_surv_quantiles <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    8x
                    
                      
    cardx::ard_survival_survfit(

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    8x
                    
                      
      x = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    8x
                    
                      
      y = y,

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    8x
                    
                      
      variables = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    8x
                    
                      
      probs = c(0.25, 0.50, 0.75),

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    8x
                    
                      
      method.args = !!method.args

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    8x
                    
                      
    cards::update_ard_fmt_fun(

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    8x
                    
                      
      stat_names = c("estimate", "conf.low", "conf.high"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    8x
                    
                      
      fmt_fun = estimate_fun

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    
                    
                      
  # calculate range of followup times ------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    8x
                    
                      
  df_time <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    8x
                    
                      
    stats::model.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    8x
                    
                      
      formula = form,

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    8x
                    
                      
      data = data

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    8x
                    
                      
    stats::setNames(c("time", by)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    8x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(time = .data$time[, 1])

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    8x
                    
                      
  ard_followup_range <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    8x
                    
                      
    cards::ard_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    8x
                    
                      
      df_time,

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    8x
                    
                      
      variables = "time",

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    8x
                    
                      
      by = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    8x
                    
                      
      statistic = everything() ~ cards::continuous_summary_fns(c("min", "max"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    8x
                    
                      
    cards::update_ard_fmt_fun(

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    8x
                    
                      
      stat_names = c("min", "max"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    8x
                    
                      
      fmt_fun = estimate_fun

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
  # calculate ARD for by vars

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    8x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(by)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    5x
                    
                      
    ard_by <- cards::ard_tabulate(data, variables = all_of(by))

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    8x
                    
                      
  ard_n <- cards::ard_total_n(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    
                    
                      
  # get the confidence level

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    8x
                    
                      
  conf.level <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    8x
                    
                      
    ard_surv_quantiles |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    8x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(.data$stat_name == "conf.level") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    8x
                    
                      
    dplyr::pull("stat") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    8x
                    
                      
    unlist()

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
  # build gtsummary table ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    8x
                    
                      
  res <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    8x
                    
                      
    dplyr::bind_rows(

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    8x
                    
                      
      ard_surv_quantiles |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    
                    
                      
        # remove model-wide stats

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    8x
                    
                      
        dplyr::filter(.data$variable == "prob") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    8x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    8x
                    
                      
          stat_name = paste0(.data$stat_name, 100 * unlist(.data$variable_level)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    8x
                    
                      
          variable_level = list(NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    8x
                    
                      
      ard_followup_range,

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    8x
                    
                      
      case_switch(!is_empty(by) ~ ard_by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    8x
                    
                      
      ard_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    8x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_ard_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    8x
                    
                      
      by = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    8x
                    
                      
      type = list(prob = "continuous2", time = "continuous"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    8x
                    
                      
      statistic = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    8x
                    
                      
        prob = c("{estimate50}", "({conf.low50}, {conf.high50})", "{estimate25}, {estimate75}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    8x
                    
                      
        time = "{min} to {max}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    8x
                    
                      
      label = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    8x
                    
                      
        prob = header,

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    8x
                    
                      
        time = "Range"

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    8x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    8x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "{level}  \n(N = {n})",

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    8x
                    
                      
      label = ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    8x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    8x
                    
                      
      ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    8x
                    
                      
        dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    8x
                    
                      
          label = dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    8x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "Survival Probability" ~ "Median",

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    8x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "(CI Lower Bound, CI Upper Bound)" ~ glue("{style_roche_number(conf.level, scale = 100)}% CI"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    8x
                    
                      
            .data$label == "Survival Probability, Survival Probability" ~ "25% and 75%-ile",

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    8x
                    
                      
            .default = .data$label

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    8x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_indent(

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    8x
                    
                      
      columns = "label",

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    8x
                    
                      
      rows = .data$label == glue("{style_roche_number(conf.level, scale = 100)}% CI"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    8x
                    
                      
      indent = 8L

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    8x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_indent(

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    8x
                    
                      
      columns = "label",

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    8x
                    
                      
      rows = .data$label == "Range",

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    8x
                    
                      
      indent = 4L

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    8x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::remove_footnote_header(columns = gtsummary::all_stat_cols())

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      
  # return tbl -----------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    8x
                    
                      
  res$cards <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    8x
                    
                      
    list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    8x
                    
                      
      tbl_survfit_quantiles =

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    8x
                    
                      
        dplyr::bind_rows(

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    8x
                    
                      
          ard_surv_quantiles,

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    8x
                    
                      
          ard_followup_range,

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    8x
                    
                      
          if (!is_empty(by)) ard_by,  # styler: off

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    8x
                    
                      
          ard_n

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    8x
                    
                      
  res$inputs <- func_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    8x
                    
                      
  res[["call_list"]] <- list(tbl_survfit_quantiles = match.call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    8x
                    
                      
  res |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    8x
                    
                      
    structure(class = c("tbl_survfit_quantiles", "gtsummary"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_survfit_quantiles

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    
                    
                      
add_overall.tbl_survfit_quantiles <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
                                              last = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    
                    
                      
                                              col_label = "All Participants  \nN = {style_roche_number(N)}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    
                    
                      
                                              ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    3x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    3x
                    
                      
  rlang::check_dots_empty(call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    3x
                    
                      
  do.call(

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    3x
                    
                      
    what = getNamespace("gtsummary")[["add_overall.tbl_summary"]],

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    3x
                    
                      
    args = list(x = x, last = last, col_label = col_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    
                    
                      
.expr_as_string <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    18x
                    
                      
  x <- enquo(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    
                    
                      
  # if a character was passed, return it as is

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    18x
                    
                      
  if (tryCatch(is.character(eval_tidy(x)), error = \(e) FALSE)) x <- eval_tidy(x) # styler: off

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    
                    
                      
  # otherwise, convert expr to string

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    !
                    
                      
  else x <- expr_deparse(quo_get_expr(x))  # styler: off

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    18x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' AE Rates by Highest Toxicity Grade

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' A wrapper function for [gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical()] to calculate rates of highest toxicity grades with the options

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' to add rows for grade groups and additional summary sections at each variable level.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' Only the highest grade level recorded for each subject will be analyzed. Prior to running the function, ensure that

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' the toxicity grade variable (`grade`) is a factor variable, with factor levels ordered lowest to highest.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' Grades will appear in rows in the order of the factor levels given, with each grade group appearing prior to the

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' first level in its group.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::sort_hierarchical

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::add_overall.tbl_hierarchical

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param variables ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   A character vector or tidy-selector of 3 columns in `data` specifying a system organ class variable,

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   an adverse event terms variable, and a toxicity grade level variable, respectively.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param include_overall ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variables from `variables` for which an overall section at that hierarchy level should be computed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   An overall section at the SOC variable level will have label `"- Any adverse events -"`. An overall section at

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   the AE term variable level will have label `"- Overall -"`. If the grade level variable is included it has no

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   effect. The default is `everything()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @param filter (`expression`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   An expression that is used to filter rows of the table. Filter will be applied to the second variable (adverse

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   event terms) specified via `variables`. See the Details section below for more information.

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' @param grade_groups (`named list`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'   A named list of grade groups for which rates should be calculated. Grade groups must be mutually exclusive, i.e.

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   each grade cannot be assigned to more than one grade group. Each grade group must be specified in the list as a

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   character vector of the grades included in the grade group, named with the corresponding name of the grade group,

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   e.g. `"Grade 1-2" = c("1", "2")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' @param grades_exclude (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   A vector of grades to omit individual rows for when printing the table. These grades will still be used when

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'   computing overall totals and grade group totals. For example, to avoid duplication, if a grade group is defined as

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   `"Grade 5" = "5"`, the individual rows corresponding to grade 5 can be excluded by setting `grades_exclude = "5"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keep_zero_rows (`logical`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   Whether rows containing zero rates across all columns should be kept. If `FALSE`, this filter will be applied

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   prior to any filters specified via the `filter` argument which may still remove these rows. Defaults to `FALSE`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   A gtsummary table of class `'tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade'`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' When using the `filter` argument, the filter will be applied to the second variable from `variables`, i.e. the

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#' adverse event terms variable. If an AE does not meet the filtering criteria, the AE overall row as well as all grade

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' and grade group rows within an AE section will be excluded from the table. Filtering out AEs does not exclude the

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' records corresponding to these filtered out rows from being included in rate calculations for overall sections. If

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' all AEs for a given SOC have been filtered out, the SOC will be excluded from the table. If all AEs are filtered out

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' and the SOC variable is included in `include_overall` the `- Any adverse events -` section will still be kept.

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' See [gtsummary::filter_hierarchical()] for more details and examples.

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns a gtsummary table of class `"tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' @name tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf identical(Sys.getenv("NOT_CRAN"), "true") || identical(Sys.getenv("IN_PKGDOWN"), "true")

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' theme_gtsummary_roche()

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#' ADSL <- cards::ADSL

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' ADAE_subset <- cards::ADAE |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::filter(

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'     AESOC %in% unique(cards::ADAE$AESOC)[1:5],

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'     AETERM %in% unique(cards::ADAE$AETERM)[1:10]

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#' grade_groups <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'   "Grade 1-2" = c("1", "2"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'   "Grade 3-4" = c("3", "4"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'   "Grade 5" = "5"

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade(

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#'   ADAE_subset,

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#'   variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD, AETOXGR),

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#'   denominator = ADSL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = TRTA,

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#'   label = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#'     AEBODSYS = "MedDRA System Organ Class",

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'     AEDECOD = "MedDRA Preferred Term",

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#'     AETOXGR = "Grade"

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'   ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#'   grade_groups = grade_groups,

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#'   grades_exclude = "5"

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 2 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#' # Filter: Keep AEs with an overall prevalence of greater than 10%

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade(

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#'   ADAE_subset,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#'   variables = c(AEBODSYS, AEDECOD, AETOXGR),

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#'   denominator = ADSL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = TRTA,

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#'   grade_groups = list("Grades 1-2" = c("1", "2"), "Grades 3-5" = c("3", "4", "5")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#'   filter = sum(n) / sum(N) > 0.10

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_overall(last = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
                                           variables,

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
                                           denominator,

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
                                           by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
                                           id = "USUBJID",

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
                                           include_overall = everything(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
                                           statistic = everything() ~ "{n} ({p}%)",

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
                                           label = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
                                           digits = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
                                           sort = "alphanumeric",

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
                                           filter = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
                                           grade_groups = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
                                           grades_exclude = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
                                           keep_zero_rows = FALSE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    25x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    25x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    25x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(variables)

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    25x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(denominator)

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    25x
                    
                      
  check_class(grades_exclude, "character", allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    24x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    24x
                    
                      
    variables = {{ variables }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    24x
                    
                      
    by = {{ by }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    24x
                    
                      
    id = {{ id }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    24x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data[variables], include_overall = {{ include_overall }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    24x
                    
                      
  check_length(variables, 3)

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    24x
                    
                      
  filter <- enquo(filter)

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
  # save function inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    24x
                    
                      
  tbl_hierarchical_rate_by_grade_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    24x
                    
                      
  soc <- variables[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    24x
                    
                      
  ae <- variables[2]

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    24x
                    
                      
  grade <- variables[3]

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    24x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(grade_groups) && !(is_named(grade_groups) && all(sapply(grade_groups, is_character)))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    1x
                    
                      
      paste(

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    1x
                    
                      
        "Grade groups must be specified via a named list where each list element is a character vector of the",

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    1x
                    
                      
        "grades to include in the grade group and each name is the corresponding name of the grade group.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    1x
                    
                      
        'For example, {.code "Grade 3-4" = c("3", "4")}.'

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    23x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(grade_groups)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    19x
                    
                      
    if (length(unique(unlist(grade_groups))) < length(unlist(grade_groups))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    1x
                    
                      
      cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    1x
                    
                      
        paste(

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    1x
                    
                      
          "Grade groups specified via {.arg grade_groups} cannot overlap.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    1x
                    
                      
          "Please ensure that each grade is included in at most one grade group."
