  y$`CI` <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    6x
                    
                      
    "(", signif(y[[paste0(conf.int, "LCL")]], 4), ", ", signif(y[[paste0(conf.int, "UCL")]], 4), ")"

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    6x
                    
                      
  stats::setNames(

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    6x
                    
                      
    y[c("records", "median", "CI")],

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    6x
                    
                      
    c("N", "Median", paste0(conf.int * 100, "% CI"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Subgroup Analyses

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Function adapted from `gtforester::tbl_subgroups()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::tbl_strata

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @importFrom cards ard_tabulate_value

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param rsp ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variable to use in responder rate calculations.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param by ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variable to make comparison between groups.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param subgroups ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variables to perform stratified analyses for.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time_to_event ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variable to use in time-to-event analyses. If specified, the mid table will

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   show the median time-to-event instead of responder rates.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns a 'gtsummary' table

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' set.seed(1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' # prepare sample data

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' df_adtte <- data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   time = rexp(100, rate = 0.1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'   status = sample(c(0, 1), 100, replace = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   arm = sample(c("Arm A", "Arm B"), 100, replace = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   grade = sample(c("I", "II"), 100, replace = TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'   strata = sample(c("1", "2"), 100, replace = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   mutate(arm = relevel(factor(arm), ref = "Arm A")) # Set Reference

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' # logistic regression -------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' df_adtte |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_roche_subgroups(

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'     rsp = "status",

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = "arm",

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'     subgroups = c("grade"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'     .tbl_fun =

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'       ~ glm(status ~ arm, data = .x) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'         tbl_regression(

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'           show_single_row = arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'           exponentiate = TRUE # , tidy_fun = broom.helpers::tidy_parameters

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'         )

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_header(starts_with("estimate") ~ "**Odds Ratio**")

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf rlang::is_installed("survival")

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' # coxph regression ----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' # please use browser() inside .tbl_fun to check if the coxph model throws an error

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#' # and use tryCatch to modify the input/output accordingly

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#' df_adtte |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_roche_subgroups(

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'     rsp = status,

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'     time_to_event = time, # Specify time variable for time-to-event analyses (different mid table)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'     subgroups = c(grade, strata),

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'     ~ survival::coxph( # Please use coxph for time-to-event analyses

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'       survival::Surv(time, status) ~ arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'       data = .x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'       ties = "exact"

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'     ) |> # Exact Ties

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'       tbl_regression(

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#'         show_single_row = arm,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#'         exponentiate = TRUE # Get Hazard Ratios

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'       )

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_header(starts_with("estimate") ~ "**Hazard Ratio**")

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
tbl_roche_subgroups <- function(data, rsp, by, subgroups, .tbl_fun, time_to_event = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    3x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(rsp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(by)

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(subgroups)

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(.tbl_fun)

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    3x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    3x
                    
                      
    rsp = {{ rsp }}, by = {{ by }}, subgroups = {{ subgroups }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    3x
                    
                      
    time_to_event = {{ time_to_event }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_string(rsp)

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_string(by)

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_string(time_to_event, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_binary(data[[rsp]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_class(subgroups, "character")

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_class(.tbl_fun, c("formula", "function"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
  # Augment data with a dummy variable for the 'All Participants' row

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    3x
                    
                      
  overall_rowname <- "All Participants"

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    3x
                    
                      
  data_aug <- data |> dplyr::mutate(..overall.. = overall_rowname)

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    3x
                    
                      
  all_vars <- c("..overall..", subgroups)

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
  # subgroup analyses

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    3x
                    
                      
  roche_subgroups_tbl <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    3x
                    
                      
    all_vars |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    3x
                    
                      
    map(

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    3x
                    
                      
      \(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    9x
                    
                      
        list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
          # total n

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    9x
                    
                      
          gtsummary::tbl_strata(

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    9x
                    
                      
            data = data_aug,

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    9x
                    
                      
            strata = dplyr::all_of(x),

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    9x
                    
                      
            .tbl_fun = ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    9x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::tbl_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    9x
                    
                      
                include = dplyr::all_of(rsp),

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    9x
                    
                      
                statistic = gtsummary::everything() ~ "{N}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    9x
                    
                      
                missing = "no"

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
              ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    9x
                    
                      
            .combine_with = "tbl_stack",

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    9x
                    
                      
            .combine_args = if (x == "..overall..") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    3x
                    
                      
              list(group_header = NULL, quiet = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
            } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    6x
                    
                      
              list(quiet = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
          ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    9x
                    
                      
            gtsummary::modify_header(stat_0 ~ "**Total n**"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
          # responder or time-to-event median statistics

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    9x
                    
                      
          gtsummary::tbl_strata(

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    9x
                    
                      
            data = data_aug,

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    9x
                    
                      
            strata = dplyr::all_of(x),

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    9x
                    
                      
            .tbl_fun =

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    9x
                    
                      
              ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    9x
                    
                      
                gtsummary::tbl_strata(

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    9x
                    
                      
                  strata = dplyr::all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    9x
                    
                      
                  .tbl_fun = ~ .make_mid_tbl(dt = .x, vars = c("rsp" = rsp, "time_to_event" = time_to_event))

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
                ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    9x
                    
                      
            .combine_with = "tbl_stack",

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    9x
                    
                      
            .combine_args = if (x == "..overall..") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    3x
                    
                      
              list(group_header = NULL, quiet = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
            } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    6x
                    
                      
              list(quiet = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
          ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
          # comparison statistics

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    9x
                    
                      
          gtsummary::tbl_strata(

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    9x
                    
                      
            data = data_aug,

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    9x
                    
                      
            strata = dplyr::all_of(x),

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    9x
                    
                      
            .tbl_fun = .tbl_fun,

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    9x
                    
                      
            .combine_with = "tbl_stack",

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    9x
                    
                      
            .combine_args = if (x == "..overall..") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    3x
                    
                      
              list(group_header = NULL, quiet = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
            } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    6x
                    
                      
              list(quiet = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
          ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    9x
                    
                      
            gtsummary::modify_header(estimate = "**estimate**")

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    9x
                    
                      
          gtsummary::tbl_merge(tab_spanner = FALSE, merge_vars = c("groupname_col", "tbl_id1", "row_type")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    9x
                    
                      
          gtsummary::modify_column_hide(c("label_2", "label_3")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
          # add a header row for the variable

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    9x
                    
                      
          gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    9x
                    
                      
            function(table_body) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    9x
                    
                      
              if (any(grepl(pattern = overall_rowname, table_body))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    3x
                    
                      
                return(

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    3x
                    
                      
                  table_body |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    3x
                    
                      
                    dplyr::mutate(label_1 = overall_rowname)

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
                )

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
              }

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    6x
                    
                      
              dplyr::bind_rows(

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    6x
                    
                      
                dplyr::tibble(

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    6x
                    
                      
                  variable = x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    6x
                    
                      
                  row_type = "label",

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    6x
                    
                      
                  label_1 = attr(data[[x]], "label") %||% x

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
                ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    6x
                    
                      
                table_body |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    6x
                    
                      
                  dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    6x
                    
                      
                    variable = x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    6x
                    
                      
                    label_1 = .data$groupname_col,

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    6x
                    
                      
                    row_type = "level"

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
                  ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    6x
                    
                      
                  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of("groupname_col"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
            }

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      
    # stack overall and subgroup analyses

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    3x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_stack() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    3x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(label_1 ~ "**Baseline Risk Factors**") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    3x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::remove_footnote_header() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    3x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::remove_abbreviation()

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    3x
                    
                      
  attr(roche_subgroups_tbl, "by") <- levels(factor(data[[by]]))

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    3x
                    
                      
  class(roche_subgroups_tbl) <- c("tbl_roche_subgroups", class(roche_subgroups_tbl))

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    3x
                    
                      
  roche_subgroups_tbl

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
# Define a function to apply the .tbl_fun to each subgroup

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    
                    
                      
.make_mid_tbl <- function(dt, vars) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    42x
                    
                      
  if ("time_to_event" %in% names(vars) && length(vars[["time_to_event"]]) > 0) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    10x
                    
                      
    out <- dt |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
      # Use ard_continuous instead of ard_tabulate_value

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    10x
                    
                      
      cards::ard_continuous(

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    10x
                    
                      
        variables = dplyr::all_of(vars[["time_to_event"]]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    10x
                    
                      
        stat_label = cards::everything() ~ list(N = "n", median = "Median")

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    
                    
                      
        # ard_continuous calculates N, mean, median, min, max, etc. by default

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    10x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::tbl_ard_wide_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    10x
                    
                      
        include = dplyr::all_of(vars[["time_to_event"]]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    
                    
                      
        # Call the specific continuous statistics here

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    10x
                    
                      
        statistic = c("{N}", "{median}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    10x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::modify_header(stat_2 ~ "**Median (Months)**")

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    32x
                    
                      
    out <- dt |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    32x
                    
                      
      cards::ard_tabulate_value(

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    32x
                    
                      
        variables = dplyr::all_of(vars[["rsp"]]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    32x
                    
                      
        stat_label = cards::everything() ~ list(N = "n", n = "responders", p = "response")

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    32x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::tbl_ard_wide_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    32x
                    
                      
        include = dplyr::all_of(vars[["rsp"]]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    32x
                    
                      
        statistic = "{N} ({p} %)"

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    
                    
                      
      ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      
      # Explicitly renames the column header itself

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    32x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::modify_header(gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "**n Response (%)**")

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    42x
                    
                      
  out

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
# Utility functions for adding forest plot to gtsummary tables

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
# Default sizes for various elements in the forest plot

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
.get_default_forest_sizes <- function(table_engine) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (table_engine == "gt") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    2x
                    
                      
    out <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
      # Lines & Strokes

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    2x
                    
                      
      line_axis = 8,

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    2x
                    
                      
      line_ref = 6,

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    2x
                    
                      
      errorbar_size = 8,

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    2x
                    
                      
      stroke = 5,

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    2x
                    
                      
      tick_width = 6,

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
      # Ticks (Large units for high-res HTML)

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    2x
                    
                      
      tick_short = unit(0.7, "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    2x
                    
                      
      tick_mid = unit(1.3, "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    2x
                    
                      
      tick_long = unit(2.5, "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
      # Text

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    2x
                    
                      
      text_size = 120,

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    2x
                    
                      
      text_margin = 60,

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
      # Dots (Scale factor for p-values)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    2x
                    
                      
      dot_max = 120,

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    2x
                    
                      
      dot_base = 40,

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
      # x-axis plot margins

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    2x
                    
                      
      axis_plot_margins = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 25, l = 5, unit = "pt")

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    3x
                    
                      
    out <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
      # Lines & Strokes (Standard ggplot sizes)

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    3x
                    
                      
      line_axis = 0.5,

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    3x
                    
                      
      line_ref = 0.4,

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    3x
                    
                      
      errorbar_size = 0.6,

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    3x
                    
                      
      stroke = 0.8,

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    3x
                    
                      
      tick_width = 0.4,

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
      # Ticks (Standard units)

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    3x
                    
                      
      tick_short = unit(0.1, "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    3x
                    
                      
      tick_mid = unit(0.15, "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    3x
                    
                      
      tick_long = unit(0.2, "cm"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
      # Text

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    3x
                    
                      
      text_size = 9, # Standard point size

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    3x
                    
                      
      text_margin = 3,

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
      # Dots

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    3x
                    
                      
      dot_max = 6, # Max dot size (e.g. 6pt)

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    3x
                    
                      
      dot_base = 2, # Default dot size if p-value missing

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
      # x-axis plot margins

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    3x
                    
                      
      axis_plot_margins = margin(t = 0, r = 5, b = 3, l = 5, unit = "pt")

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    5x
                    
                      
  out

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
# The headers are stored in x$table_styling$header

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
# We look for columns that are NOT the label column, and get their 'spanning_header'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
.determine_ggplot_header <- function(tbl, header_spaces, table_engine) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    5x
                    
                      
  raw_headers <- tbl$table_styling$spanning_header |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    5x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(.data$column != "label", !is.na(.data$spanning_header)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    5x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(grepl(.data$column, pattern = "stat")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    5x
                    
                      
    dplyr::arrange(.data$column) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    5x
                    
                      
    dplyr::pull(.data$spanning_header) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    5x
                    
                      
    unique()

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
  # Clean up headers (remove **bolding** syntax if present)

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    5x
                    
                      
  clean_headers <- gsub("\\*\\*", "", raw_headers)

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
  # Fallback: If no spanning headers exist (e.g. no 'by' variable), use generic defaults

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (length(clean_headers) > 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_warn(

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    !
                    
                      
      "More than 2 spanning headers detected. Only the first two will be used for the forest plot header."

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    !
                    
                      
    clean_headers <- clean_headers[1:2]

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    5x
                    
                      
  left_text <- clean_headers[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    5x
                    
                      
  right_text <- clean_headers[2]

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    5x
                    
                      
  header_spacer_btm <- nchar(left_text) + header_spaces - nchar("Better") + 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
  # B. Build the String

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (length(clean_headers) < 2) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    4x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_warn(

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    4x
                    
                      
      "Less than 2 spanning headers detected. The forest plot column will have an empty header."

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    4x
                    
                      
    header_text <- ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    1x
                    
                      
  } else if (table_engine == "gt") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    # GT (HTML)

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    !
                    
                      
    spacer <- paste0(rep("&nbsp;", header_spaces), collapse = "")

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    !
                    
                      
    spacer_btm <- paste0(rep("&nbsp;", header_spacer_btm), collapse = "")

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    !
                    
                      
    header_text <- gt::html(paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    !
                    
                      
      left_text, spacer, right_text, "<br>",

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    !
                    
                      
      "Better", spacer_btm, "Better"

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
    ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
    # FLEXTABLE (Text)

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    1x
                    
                      
    spacer <- paste0(rep("\u00A0", header_spaces), collapse = "")

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    1x
                    
                      
    spacer_btm <- paste0(rep("\u00A0", header_spacer_btm), collapse = "")

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    1x
                    
                      
    header_text <- paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    1x
                    
                      
      left_text, spacer, right_text, "\n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    1x
                    
                      
      "Better", spacer_btm, "Better"

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    5x
                    
                      
  header_text

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
# Function to generate a clean, centered X-axis

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
.plot_centered_axis <- function(limits, mean_estimate, sizes) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
  # create dummy data just to initialize ggplot

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    5x
                    
                      
  ggplot(data.frame(x = limits), aes(x = .data$x)) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    5x
                    
                      
    geom_blank() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
    # LOG SCALE WITH DYNAMIC BREAKS

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    5x
                    
                      
    scale_x_log10(

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    5x
                    
                      
      limits = limits,

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
      # 'n = 5' suggests roughly 5 numbers (e.g. 0.2, 0.5, 1, 2, 5)

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    5x
                    
                      
      breaks = scales::breaks_log(n = 5),

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
      # Format labels to avoid scientific notation (e.g., "0.5" instead of "5e-1")

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    5x
                    
                      
      labels = scales::label_number(drop0trailing = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
    ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
    # ADD THE "COMB" TICKS (The small ticks between numbers)

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::annotation_logticks(

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    5x
                    
                      
      sides = "b",

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    5x
                    
                      
      outside = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    5x
                    
                      
      short = sizes$tick_short,

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    5x
                    
                      
      mid = sizes$tick_mid,

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    5x
                    
                      
      long = sizes$tick_long,

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    5x
                    
                      
      linewidth = sizes$tick_width

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
    ) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
    # Add reference lines

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = mean_estimate, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 1, color = "black", linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0.2, linewidth = sizes$line_ref) +

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme_void() +

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
    # COORDINATES (Crucial so ticks don't get clipped)

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = limits, clip = "off") +

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    5x
                    
                      
    ggplot2::theme(

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
      # Draw the main horizontal axis line

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    5x
                    
                      
      axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = sizes$line_axis),

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    5x
                    
                      
      axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = sizes$line_axis),

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    5x
                    
                      
      axis.ticks.length.x = sizes$tick_long, # Match the 'long' logtick

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
      # Text styling

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    5x
                    
                      
      axis.text.x = element_text(

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    5x
                    
                      
        size = sizes$text_size,

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    5x
                    
                      
        color = "black",

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    5x
                    
                      
        margin = margin(t = sizes$text_margin)

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    5x
                    
                      
      plot.margin = sizes$axis_plot_margins

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Add row with counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' Typically used to add a row with overall AE counts to a table that primarily

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' displays AE rates.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`gtsummary`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'  a gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'  label for the new row

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param .before,.after (`integer`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'  Row index where to add the new row. Default is after last row.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data_preprocess (`function` or `formula`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'  a function that is applied to `x$inputs$data` before the total row counts

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'  are tabulated. Default is `identity`. Tidyverse formula shortcut notation

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'  for the function is accepted. See `rlang::as_function()` for details.

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' cards::ADAE |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'   # subset the data for a shorter example table

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::slice(1:10) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_hierarchical(

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = "TRTA",

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'     variables = AEDECOD,

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'     denominator = cards::ADSL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'     id = "USUBJID",

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'     overall_row = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
