#'   add_hierarchical_count_row(.after = 1L)

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
add_hierarchical_count_row <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
                                       label = "Overall total number of events",

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
                                       .before = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
                                       .after = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
                                       data_preprocess = identity) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    3x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_class(x, "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_string(label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_scalar_integerish(.before, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_scalar_integerish(.after, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
  # function to pre-process data frame

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    3x
                    
                      
  data_preprocess <- as_function(data_preprocess, call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
  # create one row summary table -----------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    3x
                    
                      
  tbl_count_one <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    3x
                    
                      
    x$inputs$data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    3x
                    
                      
    data_preprocess() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(...row_count... = TRUE) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    3x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    3x
                    
                      
      by = x$inputs$by,

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    3x
                    
                      
      include = "...row_count...",

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    3x
                    
                      
      type = list(...row_count... = "continuous"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    3x
                    
                      
      statistic = list(...row_count... = "{sum}"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    3x
                    
                      
      digits = list(...row_count... = label_roche_number()),

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    3x
                    
                      
      label = list(...row_count... = label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
  # add overall ----------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    3x
                    
                      
  if ("add_overall" %in% names(x$call_list)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    1x
                    
                      
    tbl_count_one <- add_overall(tbl_count_one)

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  # add row to primary table ---------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    3x
                    
                      
  x$table_body <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    3x
                    
                      
    x$table_body |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::add_row(

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    3x
                    
                      
      tbl_count_one$table_body[intersect(names(x$table_body), names(tbl_count_one$table_body))],

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    3x
                    
                      
      .before = .before,

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    3x
                    
                      
      .after = .after

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
  # add count row ard and call -------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    3x
                    
                      
  x$cards$add_hierarchical_count_row <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    3x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::gather_ard(tbl_count_one) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::bind_rows() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::filter(.data$stat_name == "sum")

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    3x
                    
                      
  x$call_list$add_hierarchical_count_row <- match.call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
  # return table ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    3x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Add Blank Row

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Add a blank row below each variable group defined by `variables` or below each

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' specified `row_numbers`. A blank row will not be added to the bottom of the table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' *NOTE*: For HTML flextable output (which includes the RStudio IDE Viewer),

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'         the blank rows do not render. But they will appear when the

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'         table is rendered to Word.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`gtsummary`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   a 'gtsummary' table. The table must include a column named `'variable'`

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   in `x$table_body`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' @param variables,row_numbers,variable_level ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select] or `integer`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `variables`: When a table contains variable summaries, use this argument

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'                  to add blank rows below the specified variable block.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#'  - `row_numbers`: Add blank rows after each row number specified.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'  - `variable_level`: A single column name in `x$table_body` and blank rows

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'                      will be added after each unique level.

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns updated 'gtsummary' table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' # Default to every variable used

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = trt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'     include = c(age, marker, grade),

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'     nonmissing = "always"

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_blank_rows(variables = everything())

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 2 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = trt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'     include = c(age, marker, grade),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'     nonmissing = "always"

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_blank_rows(variables = age)

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
add_blank_rows <- function(x, variables = NULL, row_numbers = NULL, variable_level = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    18x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    18x
                    
                      
  check_class(x, "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
  # process inputs -------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    18x
                    
                      
  check_class(x, "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    18x
                    
                      
  if ("variable" %in% names(x$table_body)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    6x
                    
                      
    cards::process_selectors(gtsummary::scope_table_body(x$table_body), variables = {{ variables }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    12x
                    
                      
  } else if (tryCatch(!is_empty(variables), error = \(e) TRUE)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    1x
                    
                      
      "The {.arg variables} argument cannot be specified when {.code x$table_body}

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    1x
                    
                      
       does not have a column named {.val variable}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    17x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(x$table_body, variable_level = {{ variable_level }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    17x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    17x
                    
                      
    variable_level,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    17x
                    
                      
    allow_empty = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    17x
                    
                      
    message = "The {.arg variable_level} argument may only select a single column when specified."

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  # can only specify one of `variable`, `row_numbers`, and `variable_level`

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    17x
                    
                      
  if (sum(c(!is_empty(variables), !is_empty(row_numbers), !is_empty(variable_level))) != 1L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
      "One and only one of the following arguments may be specified: {.arg variables}, {.arg row_numbers}, and {.arg variable_level}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
  # check that row_numbers is integerish and in bounds

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    16x
                    
                      
  check_integerish(row_numbers, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
  # check that row_numbers are in bounds

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    16x
                    
                      
  check_range(

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    16x
                    
                      
    row_numbers,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    16x
                    
                      
    include_bounds = c(TRUE, TRUE),

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    16x
                    
                      
    range = c(1L, nrow(x$table_body)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    16x
                    
                      
    message = c("Argument {.arg row_numbers} is out of bounds.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    16x
                    
                      
      i = "Must be between {.val {1}} and {.val {nrow(x$table_body)}}."

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
    ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    16x
                    
                      
    envir = current_env(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    16x
                    
                      
    allow_empty = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    16x
                    
                      
  updated_call_list <- append(x$call_list, list(add_blank_rows = match.call()))

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
  # add blank row --------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  # get row indices where to add blank row

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    16x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(variables)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    4x
                    
                      
    row_indices <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    4x
                    
                      
      x$table_body["variable"] |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    4x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(....crane_row_number.... = dplyr::row_number()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    4x
                    
                      
      dplyr::filter(.data$variable %in% variables) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    4x
                    
                      
      dplyr::filter(.by = "variable", dplyr::row_number() == dplyr::n()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    4x
                    
                      
      deframe()

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    12x
                    
                      
  } else if (!is_empty(variable_level)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    11x
                    
                      
    row_indices <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    11x
                    
                      
      x$table_body[variable_level] |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    11x
                    
                      
      dplyr::mutate(....crane_row_number.... = dplyr::row_number()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    11x
                    
                      
      dplyr::filter(.by = any_of(variable_level), dplyr::row_number() == dplyr::n()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    11x
                    
                      
      deframe()

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    1x
                    
                      
    row_indices <- row_numbers

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
  # remove the last row if specified, and sort and reverse the order

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    16x
                    
                      
  row_indices <- setdiff(row_indices, nrow(x$table_body)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    16x
                    
                      
    sort() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    16x
                    
                      
    unique() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    16x
                    
                      
    rev()

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
  # cycle through the row indices and add a blank row after each

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    16x
                    
                      
  for (i in seq_along(row_indices)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    16x
                    
                      
    x <- x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    16x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    16x
                    
                      
        ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    16x
                    
                      
          dplyr::add_row(

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    16x
                    
                      
            setNames(dplyr::tibble(NA), colnames(.x)[1]),

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    16x
                    
                      
            .after = row_indices[i]

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
  # return table ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    16x
                    
                      
  x$call_list <- updated_call_list

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    16x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Annotate PK Plot with Summary Table

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' These functions provide capabilities to annotate Pharmacokinetics plot

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#'  ([gg_pkc_lineplot()]) with additional summary statistics table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' The annotations are added using the `cowplot` package for flexible placement.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @param gg_plt (`ggplot2`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#'   The PK plot.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'   The raw or summarized dataset used to generate the table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param time_var,analyte_var,group ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   Optional. If `NULL` (default), the function automatically extracts these

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   from the `gg_plt` mapping.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @param summary_stats (`character`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'   A vector of statistics to include. Defaults to `c("n", "mean", "sd")`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param text_size (`numeric`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   The font size for the table text. Defaults to `3`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @param rel_height_plot (`numeric`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'   Relative height of the plot vs the table. Defaults to `0.75`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @seealso [gg_pkc_lineplot()] for related functionalities.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' # Prepare PK Data using the built-in Theoph dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk <- Theoph

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk$Time_Nominal <- round(df_pk$Time)

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' # Filter to specific timepoints to keep the table clean

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk <- df_pk[df_pk$Time_Nominal %in% c(0, 2, 4, 8, 24), ]

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' # Create a mock treatment group based on Dose

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' df_pk$Dose_Group <- ifelse(df_pk$Dose > 4.5, "High Dose", "Low Dose")

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' # Create the Base Plot using actual Theoph column names

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' p_pk <- gg_pkc_lineplot(

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_pk,

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_var = Time_Nominal,

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   analyte_var = conc,

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'   group = Dose_Group,

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   stat = "mean",

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#'   variability = "sd",

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   log_y = FALSE

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' # Annotate the Plot (Auto-detects variables from aesthetic mapping)

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' annotate_pkc_df(

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_pk,

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'   gg_plt = p_pk

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' # Annotate with specific statistics and explicit variable names

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#' annotate_pkc_df(

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_pk,

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   gg_plt = p_pk,

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'   time_var = "Time_Nominal",

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'   analyte_var = "conc",

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'   group = "Dose_Group",

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'   summary_stats = c("n", "median", "iqr")

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
annotate_pkc_df <- function(gg_plt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
                            data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
                            time_var = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
                            analyte_var = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
                            group = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
                            summary_stats = c("n", "mean", "sd"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
                            text_size = 3.5,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
                            rel_height_plot = 0.75) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
  # 1. Input Validation---------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    7x
                    
                      
  if (!inherits(gg_plt, "crane_gg_pkc")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_warn(c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    1x
                    
                      
      "!" = "`gg_plt` should be a plot generated by {.fun gg_pkc_lineplot}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    1x
                    
                      
      "i" = paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    1x
                    
                      
        "This function was specifically designed to annotate PK line plots. ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    1x
                    
                      
        "It might not provide adequate results for other type of plots."

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
    ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(time_var)) time_var <- gg_varname_extraction(gg_plt$mapping$x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(analyte_var)) analyte_var <- gg_varname_extraction(gg_plt$mapping$y)

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    6x
                    
                      
  if (is.null(group)) group <- gg_varname_extraction(gg_plt$mapping$colour)

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    7x
                    
                      
  if (any(vapply(list(time_var, analyte_var, group), is.null, logical(1)))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    2x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    2x
                    
                      
      paste0(

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    2x
                    
                      
        "Missing variables. Specify {.arg time_var}, ",

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    2x
                    
                      
        "{.arg analyte_var}, and {.arg group}."

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
  # 2. Stat Setup---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    5x
                    
                      
  stat_syntax <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    5x
                    
                      
    "n" = "{N_nonmiss}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    5x
                    
                      
    "mean" = "{mean}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    5x
                    
                      
    "sd" = "{sd}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    5x
                    
                      
    "median" = "{median}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    5x
                    
                      
    "iqr" = "{p25}, {p75}"

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    5x
                    
                      
  stat_labels <- c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    5x
                    
                      
    "n" = "n",

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    5x
                    
                      
    "mean" = "Mean",

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    5x
                    
                      
    "sd" = "SD",

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    5x
                    
                      
    "median" = "Median",

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    5x
                    
                      
    "iqr" = "IQR"

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    5x
                    
                      
  summary_stats <- match.arg(

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    5x
                    
                      
    summary_stats,

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    5x
                    
                      
    choices = names(stat_syntax),

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    5x
                    
                      
    several.ok = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    4x
                    
                      
  gts_stat <- stat_syntax[summary_stats]

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    4x
                    
                      
  gts_stat_labels <- stat_labels[summary_stats]

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
  # 3. Table Generation---------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    4x
                    
                      
  gts_tbl <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(..time_factor.. = as.factor(.data[[time_var]])) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_strata(

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    4x
                    
                      
      strata = dplyr::all_of(group),

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    4x
                    
                      
      .combine_with = "tbl_stack",

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    4x
                    
                      
      .tbl_fun = ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    4x
                    
                      
        gtsummary::tbl_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    4x
                    
                      
          by = "..time_factor..",

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    4x
                    
                      
          include = dplyr::all_of(analyte_var),

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    4x
                    
                      
          type = list(dplyr::all_of(analyte_var) ~ "continuous2"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    4x
                    
                      
          statistic = list(dplyr::all_of(analyte_var) ~ gts_stat),

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    4x
                    
                      
          missing = "no",

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    4x
                    
                      
          label = list(dplyr::all_of(analyte_var) ~ " ")

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    4x
                    
                      
        gtsummary::add_stat_label(

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    4x
                    
                      
          label = dplyr::all_of(analyte_var) ~ gts_stat_labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    4x
                    
                      
        gtsummary::modify_header(gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "{level}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(label = "remove")

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
  # 4. Cleanup with Positional Fix----------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    4x
                    
                      
  formatted_df <- as.data.frame(

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    4x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::as_tibble(gts_tbl, col_labels = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    4x
                    
                      
  formatted_df[is.na(formatted_df)] <- ""

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    4x
                    
                      
  names(formatted_df) <- gsub("\\*", "", names(formatted_df))

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    4x
                    
                      
  strata_col_name <- names(formatted_df)[1]

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    4x
                    
                      
  formatted_df <- formatted_df |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    4x
                    
                      
      Group = paste0(.data[[strata_col_name]], .data[["remove"]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    4x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(-remove)

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
  # 5. Format Labels using plotmath---------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    4x
                    
                      
  raw_labels <- as.character(formatted_df[[1]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    4x
                    
                      
  is_stat <- trimws(raw_labels) %in% c("n", "Mean", "SD", "Median", "IQR")

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    4x
                    
                      
  pk_y_labels <- parse(text = ifelse(

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    4x
                    
                      
    is_stat,

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    4x
                    
                      
    paste0('~~~~"', trimws(raw_labels), '"'),

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    4x
                    
                      
    paste0('bold("', trimws(raw_labels), '")')

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    
                    
                      
  ))

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
  # 6. Table Plotting-----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    4x
                    
                      
  gg_table <- df2gg_aligned(

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    4x
                    
                      
    df = formatted_df,

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    4x
                    
                      
    gg_plt = gg_plt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    4x
                    
                      
    show_xaxis = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    4x
                    
                      
    type = "PK",

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    4x
                    
                      
    y_labels = pk_y_labels

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    4x
                    
                      
  gg_table

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Create listings from a data frame

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' This function creates a listing from a data frame. Common uses

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' rely on few pre-processing steps, such as ensuring unique values in key columns or split

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' by rows or columns. They are described in the note section.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'   a data frame containing the data to be displayed in the listing.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @param split_by_rows,split_by_columns,add_blank_rows (named `list`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `split_by_rows`: Named list of arguments that are passed to `gtsummary::tbl_split_by_rows()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `split_by_columns`: Named list of arguments that are passed to `gtsummary::tbl_split_by_columns()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   - `add_blank_rows`: Named list of arguments that are passed to `crane::add_blank_rows()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'     `add_blank_rows()` is applied after table splitting and applied to each table individually.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'  _Variable names passed in these named lists must be character vectors; tidyselect/unquoted syntax is not accepted._

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`tbl_listing` or `list`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   a `tbl_listing` object or a list of `tbl_listing` objects.

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @param keys ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#'   columns to highlight for duplicate values. If `NULL`, nothing is done.

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' @param value (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   string to use for blank values. Defaults to `NA`. It should not be changed.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' @name tbl_listing

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' @note

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' Common pre-processing steps for the data frame that may be common:

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'  * Unique values - this should be enforced in pre-processing by users.

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'  * `NA` values - they are not printed by default in `{gtsummary}`. You can make them explicit if

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'    they need to be displayed in the listing. See example 3.

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'  * Sorting key columns and moving them to the front. See the examples pre-processing.

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'  ## Splitting the listing

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'  * Split by rows - you can split the data frame by rows by using `split_by_rows` parameter. You can use the same

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'    parameters used in [gtsummary::tbl_split_by_rows()]. See example 4.

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'  * Split by columns - you can split the data frame by columns by using `split_by_columns` parameter. Use the same

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'    parameters from [gtsummary::tbl_split_by_rows()]. See example 5.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @examplesIf crane:::is_pkg_installed("labelled")

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' # Load the trial dataset

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' trial_data <- trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::select(trt, age, marker, stage) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::filter(stage %in% c("T2", "T3")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::slice_head(n = 2, by = c(trt, stage)) |> # downsampling

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::arrange(trt, stage) |> # key columns should be sorted

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::relocate(trt, stage) # key columns should be first

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#' out <- tbl_listing(trial_data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' out

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#' out |> remove_duplicate_keys(keys = "trt")

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 2 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#' # make NAs explicit

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#' trial_data_na <- trial_data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'   mutate(across(everything(), ~ tidyr::replace_na(labelled::to_character(.), "-")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_listing(trial_data_na)

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 3 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' # Add blank rows for first key column

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' lst <- tbl_listing(trial_data_na, add_blank_rows = list(variable_level = "trt"))
