                    61
                    
                    
                      
#' lst

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#' # Can add them also manually in post-processing

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#' lst |> add_blank_rows(row_numbers = seq(2))

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 4 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#' # Split by rows

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#' list_lst <- tbl_listing(trial_data, split_by_rows = list(row_numbers = c(2, 3, 4)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#' list_lst[[2]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 5 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#' # Split by columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#' show_header_names(lst)

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#' grps <- list(c("trt", "stage", "age"), c("trt", "stage", "marker"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#' list_lst <- tbl_listing(trial_data, split_by_columns = list(groups = grps))

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' list_lst[[2]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 6 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#' # Split by rows and columns

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#' list_lst <- tbl_listing(trial_data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'   split_by_rows = list(row_numbers = c(2, 3, 4)), split_by_columns = list(groups = grps)

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#' length(list_lst) # 8 tables are flatten out

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#' list_lst[[2]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 7 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#' # Hide duplicate columns in post-processing

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#' out <- list_lst |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#'   remove_duplicate_keys(keys = c("trt", "stage"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#' out[[2]]

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_listing

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
tbl_listing <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
                        split_by_rows = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
                        split_by_columns = list(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
                        add_blank_rows = list()) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    9x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
  # Checks -----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    9x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    9x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
  # Process arguments ------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    9x
                    
                      
  tbl_listing_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
  # Build the listing ----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    9x
                    
                      
  x <- gtsummary::as_gtsummary(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    9x
                    
                      
  x$inputs <- tbl_listing_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
  # add class and attributes ---------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    9x
                    
                      
  x <- structure(

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    9x
                    
                      
    x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    9x
                    
                      
    class = c("tbl_listing", "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
  # Split it if requested ------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    9x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(split_by_rows)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    3x
                    
                      
    x <- exec(gtsummary::tbl_split_by_rows, x = x, !!!split_by_rows)

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    9x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(split_by_columns)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    2x
                    
                      
    x <- exec(gtsummary::tbl_split_by_columns, x = x, !!!split_by_columns)

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
  # Add blank rows, if requested -----------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    9x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(add_blank_rows)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    3x
                    
                      
    if (inherits(x, "list")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    2x
                    
                      
      x <- x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    2x
                    
                      
        lapply(FUN = \(.x) exec("add_blank_rows", x = .x, !!!add_blank_rows)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    2x
                    
                      
        structure(class = class(x))

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
    } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    1x
                    
                      
      x <- exec("add_blank_rows", x = x, !!!add_blank_rows)

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
  # Return the listing ---------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    9x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_listing

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
remove_duplicate_keys <- function(x, keys = NULL, value = NA) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    5x
                    
                      
  if (is.list(x) && inherits(x[[1]], "gtsummary")) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(map(x, remove_duplicate_keys, keys = {{ keys }}, value = value))

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
  # Checks -----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    4x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(x$table_body, keys = {{ keys }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    4x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(value)

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
  # Create a new data frame with blank values for duplicates

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    4x
                    
                      
  for (kcol in keys) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
    # Check if keys are unique

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    5x
                    
                      
    if (anyDuplicated(x$table_body[kcol]) > 0L) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    4x
                    
                      
      tmp_label_attr <- attr(x$table_body[[kcol]], "label") # not losing the label attribute

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    4x
                    
                      
      kcol_vec <- as.character(x$table_body[[kcol]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    4x
                    
                      
      attr(kcol_vec, "label") <- tmp_label_attr

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    4x
                    
                      
      cur_key <- paste0("", kcol_vec) # used to force into a character vector

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    4x
                    
                      
      disp <- c(TRUE, utils::tail(cur_key, -1) != utils::head(cur_key, -1))

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    4x
                    
                      
      kcol_vec[!disp] <- value

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    4x
                    
                      
      x$table_body[[kcol]] <- kcol_vec

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    4x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Risk Management Plan Table (RMPT)

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' Creates a summary table showing participant counts and person-time exposure

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' across categories of exposure duration. The table displays both:

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' - Number and percentage of participants in each exposure duration category

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' - Total person-time (sum of exposure durations) for each category

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' By default, the table does not stratify by treatment arms. Please refer to the RMP Best Practice documents for guidance.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' Total person-time is computed by summing up the exposure duration (e.g., `AVAL`) across all participants within each category.

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' The unit can be days, months or years depending on the use-case.

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams tbl_roche_summary

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::add_overall

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @param data (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'   A data frame containing the exposure data. Typically ADEX dataset filtered

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'   to one row per subject (e.g., `PARAMCD == 'TDURD'` and `PARCAT1 == 'OVERALL'`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @param variable ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   Categorical variable defining exposure duration categories (e.g., `AVAL_CAT`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   This variable should be a factor with ordered levels.

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' @param aval ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'   Continuous variable containing exposure duration values (e.g., `AVAL`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'   Used to calculate person-time by summing across participants.

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' @param by ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   Variable to report results by. Typically the treatment arm (e.g., `TRT01A` or `TRTA`).

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default is `NULL` for unstratified analysis.

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' @param id ([`tidy-select`][dplyr::dplyr_tidy_select])\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   String identifying the unique subjects. Default is `'USUBJID'`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#' @param denominator (`data.frame`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#'   Data set used to compute the header counts and percentages (typically ADSL).

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#'   Should contain columns for `id` and `by` variables.

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#'   Label for the exposure duration variable that appears in the table header.

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default is `"Duration of exposure"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`tbl_rmpt`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#'   Object of class `'tbl_rmpt'`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @param col_label (`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'   String indicating the column label for overall column.

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default is `"All Participants  \n(N = {style_roche_number(n)})"`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A gtsummary table.

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @name tbl_rmpt

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
#' # Create example exposure data

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
#' df_adsl <- pharmaverseadam::adsl |> dplyr::filter(SAFFL == "Y")

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
#' df_adex <- pharmaverseadam::adex |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::filter(PARAMCD == "TDURD", PARCAT1 == "OVERALL", SAFFL == "Y") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    
                    
                      
#'     AVAL_MONTH = AVAL / 30.4375,

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
#'     AVAL_CAT = factor(

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
#'       dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
#'         AVAL_MONTH < 1 ~ "< 1 month",

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
#'         AVAL_MONTH >= 1 & AVAL_MONTH < 3 ~ "1 to <3 months",

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
#'         AVAL_MONTH >= 3 & AVAL_MONTH < 6 ~ "3 to <6 months",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#'         TRUE ~ ">=6 months"

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#'       ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
#'       levels = c("< 1 month", "1 to <3 months", "3 to <6 months", ">=6 months")

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::select(

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
#'     USUBJID,

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      
#'     SEX,

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#'     ETHNIC,

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
#'     RACE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
#'     AGEGR1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
#'     AVAL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
#'     AVAL_MONTH,

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
#'     AVAL_CAT,

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
#'     TRT01A

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 1 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
#' # Create basic RMPT table

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_rmpt(

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_adex,

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    
                    
                      
#'   variable = AVAL_CAT,

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    
                    
                      
#'   aval = AVAL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = TRT01A,

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    
                    
                      
#'   denominator = df_adsl

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 2 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    
                    
                      
#' # Add overall column at the end

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_rmpt(

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_adex,

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    
                    
                      
#'   variable = AVAL_CAT,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    
                    
                      
#'   aval = AVAL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = TRT01A,

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
#'   denominator = df_adsl

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
#' ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#'   add_overall(last = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 3 --------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' # RMPT table for other variables (age group and sex), add label

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_rmpt(

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#'   data = df_adex,

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'   variable = AGEGR1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#'   aval = AVAL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = SEX,

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#'   denominator = df_adsl,

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#'   label = "Treatment Exposure Duration"

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_rmpt

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
tbl_rmpt <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
  data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
  variable,

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
  aval,

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
  by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
  id = "USUBJID",

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
  denominator,

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
  label = "Duration of exposure"

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    10x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(variable)

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(aval)

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    10x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(denominator)

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    9x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    8x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(denominator)

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    7x
                    
                      
  check_string(label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    7x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    7x
                    
                      
    data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    7x
                    
                      
    variable = {{ variable }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    7x
                    
                      
    aval = {{ aval }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    7x
                    
                      
    by = {{ by }},

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    7x
                    
                      
    id = {{ id }}

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    7x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(variable)

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    7x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(aval)

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    7x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(by, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    7x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(id)

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
  # Save function inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_rmpt_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
  # Create non-missing indicator variable --------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    7x
                    
                      
  data[[".non_missing_aval"]] <- !is.na(data[[aval]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
  # Pivot data wide for category-level summaries ------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    7x
                    
                      
  df_wide <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    7x
                    
                      
    tidyr::pivot_wider(

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    7x
                    
                      
      id_cols = all_of(c(id, by)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    7x
                    
                      
      names_from = all_of(variable),

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    7x
                    
                      
      values_from = all_of(c(aval, ".non_missing_aval")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    7x
                    
                      
      names_sort = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
    # Add in denominator for the header Ns

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    7x
                    
                      
    dplyr::right_join(

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    7x
                    
                      
      denominator[c(id, by)],

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    7x
                    
                      
      by = c(id, by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    7x
                    
                      
      relationship = "many-to-one"

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    
                    
                      
  # Build participant count table (by category) -------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_count_cat <- df_wide |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    7x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(all_of(by), starts_with(".non_missing_aval")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    7x
                    
                      
    dplyr::rename_with(~ str_remove(., "^\\.non_missing_aval_")) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    7x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    7x
                    
                      
      by = all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    7x
                    
                      
      missing = "no",

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    7x
                    
                      
      percent = denominator

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    
                    
                      
  # Build participant count table (overall) -----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_count_overall <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    7x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    7x
                    
                      
      by = all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    7x
                    
                      
      include = ".non_missing_aval",

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    7x
                    
                      
      label = list(.non_missing_aval = "Total"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    7x
                    
                      
      missing = "no",

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    7x
                    
                      
      percent = denominator

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
  # Stack category and overall count tables

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_count <- gtsummary::tbl_stack(

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    7x
                    
                      
    list(tbl_count_cat, tbl_count_overall),

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    7x
                    
                      
    quiet = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      
  # Build person-time table (by category) -------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_pt_cat <- df_wide |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    7x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(all_of(by), starts_with(paste0(aval, "_"))) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    7x
                    
                      
    dplyr::rename_with(~ str_remove(., paste0("^", aval, "_"))) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    7x
                    
                      
    labelled::remove_var_label() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    7x
                    
                      
    tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    7x
                    
                      
      by = all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    7x
                    
                      
      statistic = everything() ~ "{sum}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    7x
                    
                      
      type = everything() ~ "continuous",

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    7x
                    
                      
      nonmissing = "no"

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
  # Build person-time table (overall) -----------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_pt_overall <- data |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    7x
                    
                      
    tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    7x
                    
                      
      include = all_of(aval),

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    7x
                    
                      
      by = all_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    7x
                    
                      
      statistic = everything() ~ "{sum}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    7x
                    
                      
      type = everything() ~ "continuous",

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    7x
                    
                      
      label = list(Total = "Total") |> set_names(aval),

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    7x
                    
                      
      nonmissing = "no"

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    
                    
                      
  # Stack category and overall person-time tables

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    7x
                    
                      
  tbl_pt <- gtsummary::tbl_stack(

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    7x
                    
                      
    list(tbl_pt_cat, tbl_pt_overall),

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    7x
                    
                      
    quiet = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      
  # Merge count and person-time tables -----------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    7x
                    
                      
  rmpt_tbl <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    7x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_merge(

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    7x
                    
                      
      list(tbl_count, tbl_pt),

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    7x
                    
                      
      tab_spanner = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    7x
                    
                      
      quiet = TRUE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    7x
                    
                      
      merge_vars = "label"

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    
                    
                      
    # Modify column headers

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    7x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    7x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::all_stat_cols() & ends_with("_1") ~ "Participants",

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    7x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::all_stat_cols() & ends_with("_2") ~ "Person time",

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    7x
                    
                      
      label = label

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    7x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_spanning_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    7x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "{level}  \n(N = {n})"

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      
    ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    
                    
                      
    # Sort stat columns to group by treatment arm

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    7x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    7x
                    
                      
      \(.x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    7x
                    
                      
        stat_cols <- dplyr::select(.x, gtsummary::all_stat_cols()) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    7x
                    
                      
          names() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    7x
                    
                      
          sort()

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    7x
                    
                      
        dplyr::relocate(.x, all_of(stat_cols), .after = "label")

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      
  # Return table ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    7x
                    
                      
  rmpt_tbl$call_list <- list(tbl_rmpt = match.call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    7x
                    
                      
  rmpt_tbl$inputs <- tbl_rmpt_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    
                    
                      
  # Combine ARDs from both component tables

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    7x
                    
                      
  rmpt_tbl$cards <- list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    7x
                    
                      
    tbl_rmpt = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    7x
                    
                      
      tbl_count = gtsummary::gather_ard(tbl_count),

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    7x
                    
                      
      tbl_pt = gtsummary::gather_ard(tbl_pt)

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    7x
                    
                      
  rmpt_tbl |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    7x
                    
                      
    structure(class = c("tbl_rmpt", "gtsummary"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_rmpt

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
add_overall.tbl_rmpt <- function(

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    
                    
                      
  x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    
                    
                      
  last = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    
                    
                      
  col_label = "All Participants  \n(N = {style_roche_number(n)})",

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    
                    
                      
  ...

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    
                    
                      
) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    2x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    2x
                    
                      
  check_dots_empty(call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    2x
                    
                      
  check_scalar_logical(last)

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    2x
                    
                      
  if (is_empty(x$inputs$by)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    1x
                    
                      
      c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    1x
                    
                      
        "Original table was not stratified, and overall columns cannot be added.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    1x
                    
                      
        i = "Table has been returned unaltered."

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    
                    
                      
  # Build overall table --------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    1x
                    
                      
  tbl_overall <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    1x
                    
                      
    x$inputs |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    1x
                    
                      
    utils::modifyList(list(by = NULL)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    1x
                    
                      
    (\(args_list) do.call("tbl_rmpt", args = args_list))() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    1x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_spanning_header(gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ col_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    
                    
                      
  # Check the tables have the same structure before merging

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    
                    
                      
  if (

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    1x
                    
                      
    !identical(

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    1x
                    
                      
      dplyr::select(x$table_body, any_of(c("label0", "label"))),

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    1x
                    
                      
      dplyr::select(tbl_overall$table_body, any_of(c("label0", "label")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    
                    
                      
  ) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    !
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    !
                    
                      
      c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    !
                    
                      
        "!" = "The structures of the original table and the overall table are not identical,

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    !
                    
                      
         and the resulting table may be malformed."

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    
                    
                      
  # Merge tables ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    1x
                    
                      
  merged_tbl <- if (isTRUE(last)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    1x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_merge(

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    1x
                    
                      
      tbls = list(x, tbl_overall),

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    1x
                    
                      
      tab_spanner = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    1x
                    
                      
      merge_vars = c("variable", "row_type", "var_label", "label0", "label"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    1x
                    
                      
      quiet = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    314
                    !
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_merge(

                    		
                  

                  

                    315
                    !
                    
                      
      tbls = list(tbl_overall, x),

                    		
                  

                  

                    316
                    !
                    
                      
      tab_spanner = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    317
                    !
                    
                      
      merge_vars = c("variable", "row_type", "var_label", "label0", "label"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    318
                    !
                    
                      
      quiet = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    319
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    320
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    321
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    322
                    
                    
                      
  # Correct ARD structure

                    		
                  

                  

                    323
                    1x
                    
                      
  merged_tbl[["cards"]] <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    324
                    1x
                    
                      
    list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    325
                    1x
                    
                      
      tbl_rmpt = x$cards$tbl_rmpt,
