                    93
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = TRT01A,

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
#'     data_header = adsl

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 3 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#' # same as Ex2, but with two labs

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
#' adlb |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
#'   labelled::set_variable_labels(

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
#'     BTOXGRH = "Baseline NCI-CTCAE Grade",

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
#'     ATOXGRH = "Post-baseline NCI-CTCAE Grade"

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_strata_nested_stack(

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    
                    
                      
#'     strata = PARAM,

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
#'     ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      
#'       tbl_shift(

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#'         strata = BTOXGRH,

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#'         variable = ATOXGRH,

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
#'         strata_location = "header",

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
#'         by = TRT01A,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
#'         data_header = adsl

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
#'       )

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
#'   # Update header with Lab header and indentation (the '\U00A0' character adds whitespace)

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
#'     label = "Lab  \n\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    
                    
                      
#'              Baseline NCI-CTCAE Grade  \n\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
#'              Post-baseline NCI-CTCAE Grade"

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
#'   )

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
#' # Example 4 ----------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
#' # Include the treatment variable in a new column

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
#' filter(adlb, PARAMCD %in% "CHOLES") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      
#'   right_join(

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
#'     pharmaverseadam::adsl[c("USUBJID", "TRT01A")] |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    
                    
                      
#'       dplyr::filter(TRT01A != "Screen Failure"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = c("USUBJID", "TRT01A")

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_shift(

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
#'     strata = TRT01A,

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    
                    
                      
#'     variable = BTOXGRH,

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    
                    
                      
#'     by = ATOXGRH,

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    
                    
                      
#'     header = "{level}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    
                    
                      
#'     strata_label = "{strata}, N={n}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    
                    
                      
#'     label = list(TRT01A = "Actual Treatment"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    
                    
                      
#'     percent = "cell",

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    
                    
                      
#'     nonmissing = "no"

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    
                    
                      
#'   ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_spanning_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "Worst Post-baseline NCI-CTCAE Grade")

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_shift

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    
                    
                      
tbl_shift <- function(data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    
                    
                      
                      variable,

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    
                    
                      
                      strata = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    
                    
                      
                      by = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    
                    
                      
                      data_header = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    
                    
                      
                      strata_location = c("new_column", "header"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    
                    
                      
                      strata_label = "{strata}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    
                    
                      
                      header = "{level}  \nN = {n}",

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
                      label = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    154
                    
                    
                      
                      nonmissing = "always",

                    		
                  

                  

                    155
                    
                    
                      
                      nonmissing_text = "Total",

                    		
                  

                  

                    156
                    
                    
                      
                      ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    157
                    12x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    158
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    159
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    160
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_not_missing(variable)

                    		
                  

                  

                    161
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data)

                    		
                  

                  

                    162
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_data_frame(data_header, allow_empty = TRUE)

                    		
                  

                  

                    163
                    12x
                    
                      
  strata_location <- arg_match(strata_location)

                    		
                  

                  

                    164
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_string(header)

                    		
                  

                  

                    165
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_string(strata_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    166
                    12x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data, strata = {{ strata }}, variable = {{ variable }}, by = {{ by }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    167
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(strata, allow_empty = TRUE, message = "The {.arg strata} argument must select exactly one variable or none.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    168
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(variable, message = "The {.arg variable} argument must select exactly one variable.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    169
                    12x
                    
                      
  check_scalar(by, allow_empty = TRUE, message = "The {.arg by} argument must select exactly one variable or none.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    170
                    12x
                    
                      
  cards::process_formula_selectors(data[c(strata, variable)], label = label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    171
                    12x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(data_header) && any(!names(data_header) %in% names(data))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    172
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_abort(

                    		
                  

                  

                    173
                    1x
                    
                      
      c("The data frame passed in the {.arg data_header} argument should only

                    		
                  

                  

                    174
                    1x
                    
                      
        include columns that will be used to merge with {.arg data}.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    175
                    1x
                    
                      
        i = "Based on the other inputs, this likely means only including {.val {c('USUBJID', by)}}."

                    		
                  

                  

                    176
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    177
                    1x
                    
                      
      call = get_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    178
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    179
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    180
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    181
                    11x
                    
                      
  tbl_shift_inputs <- as.list(environment())

                    		
                  

                  

                    182
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    183
                    
                    
                      
  # replace strata colum with an overall if empty ------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    184
                    11x
                    
                      
  if (is_empty(strata)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    185
                    1x
                    
                      
    strata <- "...overall...strata..."

                    		
                  

                  

                    186
                    1x
                    
                      
    data[[strata]] <- "All Participants"

                    		
                  

                  

                    187
                    1x
                    
                      
    attr(data[[strata]], "label") <- "Cohort"

                    		
                  

                  

                    188
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    189
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    190
                    
                    
                      
  # build stratified table -----------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    191
                    
                    
                      
  # first get the label for the variable and the strata variable

                    		
                  

                  

                    192
                    11x
                    
                      
  strata_var_label <- label[[strata]] %||% attr(data[[strata]], "label") %||% strata

                    		
                  

                  

                    193
                    11x
                    
                      
  variable_var_label <- label[[variable]] %||% attr(data[[variable]], "label") %||% variable

                    		
                  

                  

                    194
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    195
                    
                    
                      
  # if there is a `by` variable, make it a factor to ensure all levels appear in tbls

                    		
                  

                  

                    196
                    11x
                    
                      
  if (!is_empty(by) && !is.factor(data[[by]])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    197
                    2x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(c("i" = "Converting column {.val {by}} to a factor."))

                    		
                  

                  

                    198
                    2x
                    
                      
    old_by_label <- attr(data[[by]], "label")

                    		
                  

                  

                    199
                    2x
                    
                      
    data[[by]] <- factor(data[[by]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    200
                    2x
                    
                      
    attr(data[[by]], "label") <- old_by_label

                    		
                  

                  

                    201
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    202
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    203
                    11x
                    
                      
  x <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    204
                    11x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::tbl_strata2(

                    		
                  

                  

                    205
                    11x
                    
                      
      data = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    206
                    11x
                    
                      
      strata = all_of(strata),

                    		
                  

                  

                    207
                    11x
                    
                      
      .tbl_fun =

                    		
                  

                  

                    208
                    11x
                    
                      
        \(data, stratum) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    209
                    
                    
                      
          # if `data_header` was passed, then merge it with the primary data

                    		
                  

                  

                    210
                    31x
                    
                      
          if (!is_empty(data_header)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    211
                    30x
                    
                      
            data <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    212
                    30x
                    
                      
              dplyr::right_join(

                    		
                  

                  

                    213
                    30x
                    
                      
                data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    214
                    30x
                    
                      
                data_header,

                    		
                  

                  

                    215
                    30x
                    
                      
                by = names(data_header)

                    		
                  

                  

                    216
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    217
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    218
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    219
                    
                    
                      
          # Glue the stratum level

                    		
                  

                  

                    220
                    31x
                    
                      
          stratum <- glue::glue_data(.x = list(strata = stratum, n = nrow(data)), strata_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    221
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    222
                    
                    
                      
          # build cross table

                    		
                  

                  

                    223
                    31x
                    
                      
          tbl <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    224
                    31x
                    
                      
            tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    225
                    31x
                    
                      
              data = data,

                    		
                  

                  

                    226
                    31x
                    
                      
              by = any_of(by),

                    		
                  

                  

                    227
                    31x
                    
                      
              include = all_of(variable),

                    		
                  

                  

                    228
                    31x
                    
                      
              nonmissing = nonmissing,

                    		
                  

                  

                    229
                    31x
                    
                      
              nonmissing_text = nonmissing_text,

                    		
                  

                  

                    230
                    31x
                    
                      
              label = list(stratum) |> set_names(variable), # if we keep the ..., users may try to specify this arg which would cause an error

                    		
                  

                  

                    231
                    
                    
                      
              ...

                    		
                  

                  

                    232
                    
                    
                      
            ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    233
                    31x
                    
                      
            gtsummary::modify_header(all_stat_cols() ~ header)

                    		
                  

                  

                    234
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    235
                    
                    
                      
          # If new column, add the column, update indentation and alignment

                    		
                  

                  

                    236
                    31x
                    
                      
          if (strata_location == "new_column") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    237
                    22x
                    
                      
            tbl <- tbl |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    238
                    22x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::remove_row_type(type = "header") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    239
                    22x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::modify_table_body(

                    		
                  

                  

                    240
                    22x
                    
                      
                ~ .x |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    241
                    22x
                    
                      
                  mutate(

                    		
                  

                  

                    242
                    22x
                    
                      
                    .before = "label",

                    		
                  

                  

                    243
                    22x
                    
                      
                    label0 = ifelse(dplyr::row_number() == 1L, .env$stratum, NA_character_)

                    		
                  

                  

                    244
                    
                    
                      
                  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    245
                    
                    
                      
              ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    246
                    22x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::modify_column_alignment(columns = c("label", "label0"), align = "left") |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    247
                    22x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::modify_indent(columns = label, indent = 0L) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    248
                    22x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::modify_header(label0 = strata_var_label, label = variable_var_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    249
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    250
                    
                    
                      
          # If not new column, update column header

                    		
                  

                  

                    251
                    9x
                    
                      
          else if (strata_location == "header") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    252
                    9x
                    
                      
            tbl <- tbl |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    253
                    9x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    254
                    9x
                    
                      
                label = paste(strata_var_label, variable_var_label, sep = "  \n\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0\U00A0")

                    		
                  

                  

                    255
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    256
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    257
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    258
                    11x
                    
                      
      .combine_with = "tbl_stack",

                    		
                  

                  

                    259
                    11x
                    
                      
      .combine_args = list(group_header = NULL)

                    		
                  

                  

                    260
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    261
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    262
                    
                    
                      
  # final prep of table --------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    263
                    11x
                    
                      
  x$inputs <- tbl_shift_inputs

                    		
                  

                  

                    264
                    11x
                    
                      
  x$call_list <- list(tbl_shift = match.call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    265
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    266
                    11x
                    
                      
  x %>%

                    		
                  

                  

                    267
                    11x
                    
                      
    structure(., class = c("tbl_shift", class(.)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    268
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    269
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    270
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_shift

                    		
                  

                  

                    271
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    272
                    
                    
                      
add_overall.tbl_shift <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    273
                    
                    
                      
                                  col_label = "All Participants  \n(N = {style_roche_number(n)})",

                    		
                  

                  

                    274
                    
                    
                      
                                  last = FALSE, ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    275
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    276
                    4x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    277
                    4x
                    
                      
  check_dots_empty(call = get_cli_abort_call())

                    		
                  

                  

                    278
                    4x
                    
                      
  check_string(col_label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    279
                    4x
                    
                      
  check_scalar_logical(last)

                    		
                  

                  

                    280
                    4x
                    
                      
  if (is_empty(x$inputs$by)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    281
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(

                    		
                  

                  

                    282
                    1x
                    
                      
      c("Original table was not stratified, and overall column cannot be added.",

                    		
                  

                  

                    283
                    1x
                    
                      
        i = "Table has been returned unaltered."

                    		
                  

                  

                    284
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    285
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    286
                    1x
                    
                      
    return(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    287
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    288
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    289
                    
                    
                      
  # build overall table --------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    290
                    3x
                    
                      
  tbl_overall <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    291
                    3x
                    
                      
    x$inputs |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    292
                    3x
                    
                      
    utils::modifyList(list(by = NULL)) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    293
                    3x
                    
                      
    do.call("tbl_shift", args = _)

                    		
                  

                  

                    294
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    295
                    
                    
                      
  # check the tbls have the same structure before merging

                    		
                  

                  

                    296
                    3x
                    
                      
  if (!identical(

                    		
                  

                  

                    297
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(x$table_body, any_of(c("label0", "label"))),

                    		
                  

                  

                    298
                    3x
                    
                      
    dplyr::select(tbl_overall$table_body, any_of(c("label0", "label")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    299
                    
                    
                      
  )) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    300
                    1x
                    
                      
    cli::cli_inform(

                    		
                  

                  

                    301
                    1x
                    
                      
      c("!" = "The structures of the original table and the overall table are not identical,

                    		
                  

                  

                    302
                    1x
                    
                      
         and the resulting table may be malformed.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    303
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    304
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    305
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    306
                    
                    
                      
  # merge tables ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    307
                    3x
                    
                      
  gtsummary::tbl_merge(

                    		
                  

                  

                    308
                    3x
                    
                      
    tbls = list(x, tbl_overall),

                    		
                  

                  

                    309
                    3x
                    
                      
    tab_spanner = FALSE,

                    		
                  

                  

                    310
                    3x
                    
                      
    merge_vars = c("variable", "row_type", "var_label", "label0", "label"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    311
                    3x
                    
                      
    quiet = TRUE

                    		
                  

                  

                    312
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    313
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Roche Theme

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' A gtsummary theme for Roche tables

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' - flextable- and gt-printed tables are styled with reduced padding and font size.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' - Uses `label_roche_pvalue()` as the default formatting function for all p-values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' - Uses `label_roche_percent()` as the default formatting function for all percent values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' - Font size defaults are 8 points for all the table by the footers that are 7 points.

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' - Border defaults to `flextable::fp_border_default(width = 0.5)`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' - The `add_overall(col_label)` default value has been updated.

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' - The results from `gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical()` and `gtsummary::tbl_hierarchical_count()`

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#'   are now post-processed with `gtsummary::remove_footnote_header()`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   `crane::modify_zero_recode()`, and `crane::modify_header_rm_md()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::theme_gtsummary_printer

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::theme_gtsummary_compact

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' @return theme list

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' theme_gtsummary_roche()

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_roche_summary(

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'   trial,

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'   by = trt,

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'   include = c(age, grade),

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'   nonmissing = "always"

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' reset_gtsummary_theme()

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
theme_gtsummary_roche <- function(font_size = NULL,

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
                                  print_engine = c("flextable", "gt", "kable", "kable_extra", "huxtable", "tibble"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
                                  set_theme = TRUE) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    9x
                    
                      
  print_engine <- arg_match(print_engine)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    9x
                    
                      
  check_scalar_logical(set_theme)

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
  # {crane} defaults

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    9x
                    
                      
  border <- flextable::fp_border_default(width = 0.5)

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
  # Initialization with compact gt options -------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    9x
                    
                      
  lst_theme <- list("pkgwide-str:theme_name" = "Roche")

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
  # Specifying that no type interpretation will happen automatically -----------

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    9x
                    
                      
  lst_theme <- lst_theme |> append(list("assign_summary_type-arg:cat_threshold" = 0L))

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
  # updating with some pharma-specific bits ------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    9x
                    
                      
  lst_theme <- lst_theme |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    9x
                    
                      
    append(

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    9x
                    
                      
      list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    9x
                    
                      
        "tbl_summary-fn:percent_fun" = label_roche_percent(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    9x
                    
                      
        "pkgwide-fn:pvalue_fun" = label_roche_pvalue(),

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    9x
                    
                      
        "pkgwide-fun:pre_conversion" = function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    
                    
                      
          # This runs on every gtsummary table before printing - added for tbl_strata(.header = "{strata}")

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    61x
                    
                      
          crane::modify_header_rm_md(x, md = "bold", type = "star")

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
        },

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    9x
                    
                      
        "add_overall.tbl_summary-arg:col_label" = "All Participants  \n(N = {style_roche_number(N)})",

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    9x
                    
                      
        "pkgwide-str:print_engine" = print_engine,

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    9x
                    
                      
        "tbl_hierarchical-fn:addnl-fn-to-run" =

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    9x
                    
                      
          \(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    14x
                    
                      
            gtsummary::remove_footnote_header(x) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    14x
                    
                      
              gtsummary::modify_header(

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    14x
                    
                      
                gtsummary::all_stat_cols() ~ "{level}  \n(N = {style_roche_number(n)})"

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
              ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    14x
                    
                      
              modify_zero_recode() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    14x
                    
                      
              modify_header_rm_md()

                    		
                  

                  

                    68
                    
                    
                      
          },

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    9x
                    
                      
        "tbl_hierarchical_count-fn:addnl-fn-to-run" =

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    9x
                    
                      
          \(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    11x
                    
                      
            gtsummary::remove_footnote_header(x) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    11x
                    
                      
              modify_zero_recode() |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    11x
                    
                      
              modify_header_rm_md()

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
          }

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    
                    
                      
  # {flextable} options --------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    9x
                    
                      
  lst_theme$`as_flex_table-lst:addl_cmds` <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    9x
                    
                      
    c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    9x
                    
                      
      lst_theme$`as_flex_table-lst:addl_cmds`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    9x
                    
                      
      list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    9x
                    
                      
        fontsize = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::fontsize(size = !!(font_size %||% 8), part = "all"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    9x
                    
                      
        border = list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::border_outer(part = "body", border = !!border))

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    
                    
                      
        ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    9x
                    
                      
        valign = list( # valign only because it will append to to last commands

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::fontsize(size = !!((font_size %||% 8) - 1), part = "footer")), # second fontsize spectbl

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::border_outer(part = "header", border = !!border)), # second command from border

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::border_inner_h(part = "header", border = !!border)), # fix different line sizes

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::valign(valign = "top", part = "all")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::font(fontname = "Arial", part = "all")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::padding(padding.top = 0, part = "all")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::padding(padding.bottom = 0, part = "all")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::line_spacing(space = 1, part = "all")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    9x
                    
                      
          rlang::expr(flextable::set_table_properties(layout = "autofit"))

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
        )

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
  # add a monospace font for gt ------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    9x
                    
                      
  lst_theme$`as_gt-lst:addl_cmds` <-

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    9x
                    
                      
    c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    9x
                    
                      
      lst_theme$`as_gt-lst:addl_cmds`,

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    9x
                    
                      
      list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    9x
                    
                      
        cols_hide =

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    9x
                    
                      
          list(

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    9x
                    
                      
            rlang::expr(gt::opt_table_font(font = "arial")),

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    9x
                    
                      
            rlang::expr(

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    9x
                    
                      
              gt::tab_options(

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    9x
                    
                      
                table.font.size = !!(font_size %||% 13),

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    9x
                    
                      
                data_row.padding = gt::px(1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    9x
                    
                      
                summary_row.padding = gt::px(1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    9x
                    
                      
                grand_summary_row.padding = gt::px(1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    9x
                    
                      
                footnotes.padding = gt::px(1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    9x
                    
                      
                source_notes.padding = gt::px(1),

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    9x
                    
                      
                row_group.padding = gt::px(1)

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    
                    
                      
              )

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    
                    
                      
            )

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    
                    
                      
          )

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    
                    
                      
  # finishing up ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    8x
                    
                      
  if (set_theme == TRUE) gtsummary::set_gtsummary_theme(lst_theme)

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    9x
                    
                      
  return(invisible(lst_theme))

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
#' Formatting percent and p-values

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' - `label_roche_pvalue()` returns formatted p-values.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' - `label_roche_percent()` returns formatted percent values. This function only formats percentages between 0 and 1.

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#' - `label_roche_ratio()` returns formatted ratios with values below and above a threshold being returned as `< 0.1` and `> 999.9`, for example, when `digits=1`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' - `label_roche_number()` returns formatted numbers.

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' @return A character vector of rounded p-values

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::style_number

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @inheritParams gtsummary::style_pvalue

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @param na,inf,nan (`NA`/`string`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#'   scalar to replace `NA`, infinite, and `NaN` values with.

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#'   Default is `"NE"` for arguments `na`, `inf`, and `nan` argument.

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' # p-value formatting

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#' x <- c(0.0000001, 0.123456)

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' style_roche_pvalue(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#' label_roche_pvalue()(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#' # percent formatting

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#' x <- c(0.0008, 0.9998)

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#' style_roche_percent(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#' label_roche_percent()(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#' # ratio formatting

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#' x <- c(0.0008, 0.8234, 2.123, 1000)

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' style_roche_ratio(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' label_roche_ratio()(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' # number formatting

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#' x <- c(0.0008, 0.8234, 2.123, 1000, NA, Inf, -Inf)

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' style_roche_number(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' label_roche_number()(x)

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#' @name label_roche

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
NULL

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname label_roche

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
style_roche_pvalue <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
                               big.mark = ifelse(decimal.mark == ",", " ", ","),

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
                               decimal.mark = getOption("OutDec"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
                               ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    17x
                    
                      
  dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      
    # allowing some leeway for numeric storage errors

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    17x
                    
                      
    x > 1 + 1e-15 ~ NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    17x
                    
                      
    x < 0 - 1e-15 ~ NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    17x
                    
                      
    x < 0.0001 ~

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    17x
                    
                      
      paste0("<", style_roche_number(0.0001, digits = 4, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, ...)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    17x
                    
                      
    .default = style_roche_number(x, digits = 4, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, ...)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname label_roche

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
label_roche_pvalue <- function(big.mark = ifelse(decimal.mark == ",", " ", ","),

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
                               decimal.mark = getOption("OutDec"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    
                    
                      
                               ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    14x
                    
                      
  function(x) style_roche_pvalue(x, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, ...)

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    66
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    67
                    
                    
                      
#' @export
