                    68
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname label_roche

                    		
                  

                  

                    69
                    
                    
                      
style_roche_percent <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    70
                    
                    
                      
                                digits = 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    71
                    
                    
                      
                                prefix = "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    72
                    
                    
                      
                                suffix = "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    73
                    
                    
                      
                                scale = 100,

                    		
                  

                  

                    74
                    
                    
                      
                                big.mark = ifelse(decimal.mark == ",", " ", ","),

                    		
                  

                  

                    75
                    
                    
                      
                                decimal.mark = getOption("OutDec"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    76
                    
                    
                      
                                ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    77
                    6946x
                    
                      
  dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    78
                    6946x
                    
                      
    is.na(x) ~ NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    79
                    6946x
                    
                      
    abs(x - 1) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps) ~ style_roche_number(1, scale = 100, digits = digits - 1, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, suffix = suffix, ...),

                    		
                  

                  

                    80
                    6946x
                    
                      
    x > 0.999 & x < 1 ~ style_roche_number(0.999, scale = 100, digits = digits, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, prefix = ">", suffix = suffix, ...),

                    		
                  

                  

                    81
                    6946x
                    
                      
    x < 0.001 & x > 0 ~ style_roche_number(0.001, scale = 100, digits = digits, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, prefix = "<", suffix = suffix, ...),

                    		
                  

                  

                    82
                    6946x
                    
                      
    abs(x - 0) < sqrt(.Machine$double.eps) ~ style_roche_number(0.0, scale = 100, digits = digits, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, suffix = suffix, ...),

                    		
                  

                  

                    83
                    6946x
                    
                      
    x < 0 | x > 1 ~ NA_character_,

                    		
                  

                  

                    84
                    6946x
                    
                      
    TRUE ~ style_roche_number(

                    		
                  

                  

                    85
                    6946x
                    
                      
      x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    86
                    6946x
                    
                      
      scale = 100,

                    		
                  

                  

                    87
                    6946x
                    
                      
      digits = digits,

                    		
                  

                  

                    88
                    6946x
                    
                      
      big.mark = big.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    89
                    6946x
                    
                      
      decimal.mark = decimal.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    90
                    6946x
                    
                      
      suffix = suffix,

                    		
                  

                  

                    91
                    6946x
                    
                      
      prefix = prefix,

                    		
                  

                  

                    92
                    
                    
                      
      ...

                    		
                  

                  

                    93
                    
                    
                      
    )

                    		
                  

                  

                    94
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    95
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    96
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    97
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    98
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname label_roche

                    		
                  

                  

                    99
                    
                    
                      
label_roche_percent <- function(digits = 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    100
                    
                    
                      
                                suffix = "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    101
                    
                    
                      
                                scale = 100,

                    		
                  

                  

                    102
                    
                    
                      
                                big.mark = ifelse(decimal.mark == ",", " ", ","),

                    		
                  

                  

                    103
                    
                    
                      
                                decimal.mark = getOption("OutDec"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    104
                    
                    
                      
                                ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    105
                    77x
                    
                      
  function(x) style_roche_percent(x, suffix = suffix, big.mark = big.mark, decimal.mark = decimal.mark, digits = digits, ...)

                    		
                  

                  

                    106
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    107
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    108
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    109
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname label_roche

                    		
                  

                  

                    110
                    
                    
                      
style_roche_ratio <- function(x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    111
                    
                    
                      
                              digits = 2,

                    		
                  

                  

                    112
                    
                    
                      
                              prefix = "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    113
                    
                    
                      
                              suffix = "",

                    		
                  

                  

                    114
                    
                    
                      
                              scale = 1,

                    		
                  

                  

                    115
                    
                    
                      
                              big.mark = ifelse(decimal.mark == ",", " ", ","),

                    		
                  

                  

                    116
                    
                    
                      
                              decimal.mark = getOption("OutDec"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    117
                    
                    
                      
                              ...) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    118
                    2x
                    
                      
  dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    119
                    
                    
                      
    # Lower threshold

                    		
                  

                  

                    120
                    2x
                    
                      
    x < 10^(-digits) ~

                    		
                  

                  

                    121
                    2x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::style_number(

                    		
                  

                  

                    122
                    2x
                    
                      
        x = 10^(-digits),

                    		
                  

                  

                    123
                    2x
                    
                      
        digits = digits,

                    		
                  

                  

                    124
                    2x
                    
                      
        prefix = paste0(prefix, "<"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    125
                    2x
                    
                      
        suffix = suffix,

                    		
                  

                  

                    126
                    2x
                    
                      
        scale = scale,

                    		
                  

                  

                    127
                    2x
                    
                      
        big.mark = big.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    128
                    2x
                    
                      
        decimal.mark = decimal.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    129
                    
                    
                      
        ...

                    		
                  

                  

                    130
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    131
                    
                    
                      
    # Upper threshold

                    		
                  

                  

                    132
                    2x
                    
                      
    x > 1000 - 10^(-digits) ~

                    		
                  

                  

                    133
                    2x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::style_number(

                    		
                  

                  

                    134
                    2x
                    
                      
        x = 1000 - 10^(-digits),

                    		
                  

                  

                    135
                    2x
                    
                      
        digits = digits,

                    		
                  

                  

                    136
                    2x
                    
                      
        prefix = paste0(prefix, ">"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    137
                    2x
                    
                      
        suffix = suffix,

                    		
                  

                  

                    138
                    2x
                    
                      
        scale = scale,

                    		
                  

                  

                    139
                    2x
                    
                      
        big.mark = big.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    140
                    2x
                    
                      
        decimal.mark = decimal.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    141
                    
                    
                      
        ...

                    		
                  

                  

                    142
                    
                    
                      
      ),

                    		
                  

                  

                    143
                    
                    
                      
    # All numbers not above or below threshold

                    		
                  

                  

                    144
                    2x
                    
                      
    .default =

                    		
                  

                  

                    145
                    2x
                    
                      
      gtsummary::style_number(

                    		
                  

                  

                    146
                    2x
                    
                      
        x = x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    147
                    2x
                    
                      
        digits = digits,

                    		
                  

                  

                    148
                    2x
                    
                      
        prefix = prefix,

                    		
                  

                  

                    149
                    2x
                    
                      
        suffix = suffix,

                    		
                  

                  

                    150
                    2x
                    
                      
        scale = scale,

                    		
                  

                  

                    151
                    2x
                    
                      
        big.mark = big.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    152
                    2x
                    
                      
        decimal.mark = decimal.mark,

                    		
                  

                  

                    153
                    
                    
                      
        ...

#' Creates null report

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' This function creates a null report for tables or listings without any statistics.

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' @param label (`string`)\cr label to display in the header of the null report. It defaults to

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'   "No observations met the reporting criteria for this output."

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' tbl_null_report(label = "No data available for the selected criteria.")

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' @rdname tbl_null_report

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
tbl_null_report <- function(label = "No observations met the reporting criteria for this output.") {

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    3x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
  # Check input label ----------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    3x
                    
                      
  check_string(label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
  # Create empty gtsummary object ----------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    2x
                    
                      
  x <- gtsummary::as_gtsummary(data.frame(label = character())) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    2x
                    
                      
    gtsummary::modify_header(label = label)

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
  # add class and attributes ---------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    2x
                    
                      
  x <- structure(

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    2x
                    
                      
    x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    2x
                    
                      
    class = c("tbl_null_report", "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    2x
                    
                      
  x

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                
              

            

            

              

                
                  

                    1
                    
                    
                      
case_switch <- function(..., .default = NULL) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    40x
                    
                      
  dots <- dots_list(...)

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    40x
                    
                      
  for (f in dots) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    40x
                    
                      
    if (isTRUE(eval(f_lhs(f), envir = attr(f, ".Environment")))) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    20x
                    
                      
      return(eval(f_rhs(f), envir = attr(f, ".Environment")))

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    20x
                    
                      
  return(.default)

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
# function to estimate default decimal places to display for tbl_roche_summary()

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
.guess_roche_summary_digits <- function(data, include) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    86x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    86x
                    
                      
  cards::process_selectors(data, include = {{ include }})

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    86x
                    
                      
  stat_meas <- c("mean", "sd", "var", "median", "p25", "p50", "p75") # dp = max(DP) + 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    86x
                    
                      
  stat_fixed_cts <- c("min", "max", "sum", "n") # dp = max(DP)

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    86x
                    
                      
  stat_fixed_cat <- c("n", "N", "N_obs", "N_miss", "N_nonmiss") # dp = 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    86x
                    
                      
  stat_pct <- c("p", "p_miss", "p_nonmiss") # dp = 1

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    86x
                    
                      
  lapply(

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    86x
                    
                      
    include,

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    86x
                    
                      
    function(var) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
      # continuous variables

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    325x
                    
                      
      if (is.numeric(data[[var]])) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
        # get max digits for variable

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    259x
                    
                      
        max_dp <- max(vapply(data[[var]], .count_dp, FUN.VALUE = numeric(1)))

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    259x
                    
                      
        c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    259x
                    
                      
          rep(list(label_roche_number(digits = max_dp + 1)), length(stat_meas)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    259x
                    
                      
          rep(list(label_roche_number(digits = max_dp)), length(stat_fixed_cts))

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    259x
                    
                      
          stats::setNames(c(stat_meas, stat_fixed_cts))

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
        # non-continuous variables

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
      } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    66x
                    
                      
        c(

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    66x
                    
                      
          rep(list(label_roche_number(digits = 0)), length(stat_fixed_cat)),

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    66x
                    
                      
          rep(list(label_roche_percent(digits = 1, scale = 100)), length(stat_pct))

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
        ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    66x
                    
                      
          stats::setNames(c(stat_fixed_cat, stat_pct))

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
      }

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
    }

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
  ) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    86x
                    
                      
    stats::setNames(include)

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
}

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    
                    
                      
# function to count decimal places in a number

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    
                    
                      
.count_dp <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    64976x
                    
                      
  if (is.na(x)) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    55801x
                    
                      
    return(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    9175x
                    
                      
  } else if (abs(x - round(x)) > .Machine$double.eps^0.5) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    324x
                    
                      
    nchar(strsplit(format(x, scientific = FALSE, trim = FALSE), ".", fixed = TRUE)[[1]][[2]])

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    
                    
                      
  } else {

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    8851x
                    
                      
    return(0)

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
  }

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    
                    
                      
}

#' Zero Count Recode

                    		
                  

                  

                    2
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    3
                    
                    
                      
#' @description

                    		
                  

                  

                    4
                    
                    
                      
#' This function removes the percentage from cells with zero counts.

                    		
                  

                  

                    5
                    
                    
                      
#' For example,

                    		
                  

                  

                    6
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    7
                    
                    
                      
#' ```r

                    		
                  

                  

                    8
                    
                    
                      
#' 0 (0.0%)      -->  0

                    		
                  

                  

                    9
                    
                    
                      
#' 0 (0%)        -->  0

                    		
                  

                  

                    10
                    
                    
                      
#' 0 (NA%)       -->  0

                    		
                  

                  

                    11
                    
                    
                      
#' 0 / nn (0%)   -->  0 / nn

                    		
                  

                  

                    12
                    
                    
                      
#' 0/nn (0.0%)   -->  0/nn

                    		
                  

                  

                    13
                    
                    
                      
#' 0 / 0 (NA%)   -->  0 / 0

                    		
                  

                  

                    14
                    
                    
                      
#' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    15
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    16
                    
                    
                      
#' @details

                    		
                  

                  

                    17
                    
                    
                      
#' The function is a wrapper for `gtsummary::modify_post_fmt_fun()`.

                    		
                  

                  

                    18
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    19
                    
                    
                      
#' ```r

                    		
                  

                  

                    20
                    
                    
                      
#' gtsummary::modify_post_fmt_fun(

                    		
                  

                  

                    21
                    
                    
                      
#'   x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    22
                    
                    
                      
#'   fmt_fun = \(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    23
                    
                    
                      
#'     dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    24
                    
                    
                      
#'       # convert "0 (0%)" OR "0 (0.0%)" OR 0 (NA%) to "0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    25
                    
                    
                      
#'       str_detect(x, "^0\\s\\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$") ~ str_remove(x, pattern = "\\s\\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    26
                    
                    
                      
#'       # convert "0 / nn (0%)" OR "0/nn (0.0%)" OR 0/0 (NA%) to "0 / nn" OR "0/nn" OR "0/0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    27
                    
                    
                      
#'       str_detect(x, pattern = "^(0 ?/) ?\\d+[^()]* \\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$") ~ str_remove(x, pattern = "\\s\\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    28
                    
                    
                      
#'       .default = x

                    		
                  

                  

                    29
                    
                    
                      
#'     )

                    		
                  

                  

                    30
                    
                    
                      
#'   },

                    		
                  

                  

                    31
                    
                    
                      
#'   columns = gtsummary::all_stat_cols()

                    		
                  

                  

                    32
                    
                    
                      
#' )

                    		
                  

                  

                    33
                    
                    
                      
#' ```

                    		
                  

                  

                    34
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    35
                    
                    
                      
#' @param x (`gtsummary`)\cr

                    		
                  

                  

                    36
                    
                    
                      
#'   a gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    37
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    38
                    
                    
                      
#' @returns a gtsummary table

                    		
                  

                  

                    39
                    
                    
                      
#' @export

                    		
                  

                  

                    40
                    
                    
                      
#'

                    		
                  

                  

                    41
                    
                    
                      
#' @examples

                    		
                  

                  

                    42
                    
                    
                      
#' trial |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    43
                    
                    
                      
#'   dplyr::mutate(trt = factor(trt, levels = c("Drug A", "Drug B", "Drug C"))) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    44
                    
                    
                      
#'   tbl_summary(include = trt) |>

                    		
                  

                  

                    45
                    
                    
                      
#'   modify_zero_recode()

                    		
                  

                  

                    46
                    
                    
                      
modify_zero_recode <- function(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    47
                    
                    
                      
  # check inputs ---------------------------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    48
                    124x
                    
                      
  set_cli_abort_call()

                    		
                  

                  

                    49
                    124x
                    
                      
  check_class(x, "gtsummary")

                    		
                  

                  

                    50
                    
                    
                      

                    		
                  

                  

                    51
                    
                    
                      
  # recode zero and percent to "0" ---------------------------------------------

                    		
                  

                  

                    52
                    124x
                    
                      
  gtsummary::modify_post_fmt_fun(

                    		
                  

                  

                    53
                    124x
                    
                      
    x,

                    		
                  

                  

                    54
                    124x
                    
                      
    fmt_fun = \(x) {

                    		
                  

                  

                    55
                    125x
                    
                      
      dplyr::case_when(

                    		
                  

                  

                    56
                    
                    
                      
        # convert "0 (0%)" OR "0 (0.0%)" OR 0 (NA%) to "0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    57
                    125x
                    
                      
        str_detect(x, "^0\\s\\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$") ~ str_remove(x, pattern = "\\s\\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    58
                    
                    
                      
        # convert "0 / nn (0%)" OR "0/nn (0.0%)" OR 0/0 (NA%) to "0 / nn" OR "0/nn" OR "0/0"

                    		
                  

                  

                    59
                    125x
                    
                      
        str_detect(x, pattern = "^(0 ?/) ?\\d+[^()]* \\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$") ~ str_remove(x, pattern = "\\s\\((?:0(?:\\.0)?|NA)%\\)$"),

                    		
                  

                  

                    60
                    125x
                    
                      
        .default = x

                    		
                  

                  

                    61
                    
                    
                      
      )

                    		
                  

                  

                    62
                    
                    
                      
    },

                    		
                  

                  

                    63
                    124x
                    
                      
    columns = gtsummary::all_stat_cols()

                    		
                  

                  

                    64
                    
                    
                      
  )

                    		
                  

                  

                    65
                    
                    
                      
}
